final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Basic SQS Queue Stack'

Parameters:
  QueueName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'queue'
  VisibilityTimeoutSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
  MessageRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 345600
  ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 0

Resources:
  SqsEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'Customer-managed KMS key for SQS encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: '*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SQS service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sqs.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
  BasicQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${QueueName}'
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeoutSeconds
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriod
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: !Ref ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${QueueName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Production'

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the SQS Queue'
    Value: !Ref BasicQueue
  QueueArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SQS Queue'
    Value: !GetAtt BasicQueue.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'SNS Topic with email subscription for test notifications'

Resources:
  SnsEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for SNS topic encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'

            Resource: '*'

              Service: sns.amazonaws.com

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates an Amazon S3 bucket with secure defaults for production use.'

Resources:
  MyBucketKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for S3 bucket encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable IAM User Permissions'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 encryption'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'

  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-bucket-${AWS::StackName}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref MyBucketKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: 'TransitionNoncurrentToGlacierAndExpire'
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: 30
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            ExpirationInDays: 90
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'ForceSSL'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref Bucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt Bucket.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a secure S3 bucket with CloudFront distribution for static website hosting, KMS encryption, strict public access blocks, DeletionPolicy: Retain, versioning, OAI-based access enforcing HTTPS via CloudFront, WAFv2 protection, and TLSv1.2+ enforcement.'

Resources:
  StaticWebsiteKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for static website S3 bucket encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 to use key'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow CloudFront to decrypt'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'cloudfront.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: 'StaticWebsiteKey'
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'StaticWebsiteHosting'

  Bucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: 'aws:kms'
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref StaticWebsiteKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-StaticWebsiteBucket'
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'StaticWebsiteHosting'

  StaticWebsiteOAI:
    Type: 'AWS::CloudFront::CloudFrontOriginAccessIdentity'
    Properties:
      Comment: !Sub 'OAI for S3 static website bucket in stack ${AWS::StackName}'

  WebsiteWebACL:
    Type: 'AWS::WAFv2::WebACL'
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebsiteWebACL'
      Scope: 'CLOUDFRONT'
      DefaultAction:
        Allow: {}
      VisibilityConfig:
        SampledRequestsEnabled: true
        CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: true
        MetricName: 'WebsiteWebACL'
      Rules:
        - Name: 'AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet'
          Priority: 1
          Statement:
            ManagedRuleGroupStatement:
              VendorName: 'AWS'
              Name: 'AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet'
          OverrideAction:
            None: {}
          VisibilityConfig:
            SampledRequestsEnabled: true
            CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: true
            MetricName: 'CommonRuleSet'

  CloudFrontDistribution:
    Type: 'AWS::CloudFront::Distribution'
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Enabled: true
        DefaultRootObject: 'index.html'
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: 'StaticWebsiteBucketOrigin'
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: 'redirect-to-https'
          AllowedMethods:
            - 'GET'
            - 'HEAD'
            - 'OPTIONS'
          CachedMethods:
            - 'GET'
            - 'HEAD'
          Compress: true
          ForwardedValues:
            QueryString: false
            Cookies:
              Forward: 'none'
        CustomErrorResponses:
          - ErrorCode: 403
            ResponseCode: 200
            ResponsePagePath: '/error.html'
          - ErrorCode: 404
            ResponseCode: 200
            ResponsePagePath: '/error.html'
        ViewerCertificate:
          CloudFrontDefaultCertificate: true
          MinimumProtocolVersion: 'TLSv1.2_2021'
        WebACLId: !Ref WebsiteWebACL
        Origins:
          - Id: 'StaticWebsiteBucketOrigin'
            DomainName: !GetAtt Bucket.DomainName
            S3OriginConfig:
              OriginAccessIdentity: !Sub 'origin-access-identity cloudfront:${StaticWebsiteOAI}'

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              CanonicalUser: !GetAtt StaticWebsiteOAI.S3CanonicalUserId
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'AWS:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudfront::${AWS::AccountId}:distribution/${CloudFrontDistribution}'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              CanonicalUser: !GetAtt StaticWebsiteOAI.S3CanonicalUserId
            Action:
              - 's3:ListBucket'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${Bucket}'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'AWS:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudfront::${AWS::AccountId}:distribution/${CloudFrontDistribution}'

Outputs:
  CloudFrontURL:
    Description: 'URL for the CloudFront static website'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${CloudFrontDistribution.DomainName}'
  CloudFrontDistributionDomainName:
    Description: 'Domain name for the CloudFront distribution'
    Value: !GetAtt CloudFrontDistribution.DomainName
  DomainName:
    Description: 'Domain name for the S3 bucket (REST endpoint)'
    Value: !GetAtt Bucket.DomainName

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a basic EC2 t3.micro instance with secure remote management using AWS Systems Manager (SSM), including VPC, public subnet, minimal security group, and IAM role for SSM access.'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0a313d6098716f372
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0fab96675f789a8f8
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0d958faeb3f10cc07
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0a5c3558529278c43
    eu-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0badb826e140b706f
    ap-southeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0b8f735d8e4f744fb
    ap-southeast-2:
      AMI: ami-0c5cdaf3fb26f4e97
    ap-northeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0d5074e1a230e35d9
    ap-northeast-2:
      AMI: ami-0a40f9e7e63e8c5d4
    ap-south-1:
      AMI: ami-099b429040fb2e9b8
    ca-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0a78718f24c7901e5

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-IGW"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PublicDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Minimal security group for SSM outbound access only'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSG"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EC2SSMRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EC2SSMRole"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  BasicSSMInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeType: gp3
            VolumeSize: 8
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpEndpoint: enabled
        HttpTokens: required
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: "0"
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          Groups:
            - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum -y update
          yum -y install aws-cfn-bootstrap awscli jq
          TOKEN=$(curl -X PUT "http://169.254.169.254/latest/api/token" -H "X-aws-ec2-metadata-token-ttl-seconds: 21600" -s)
          INSTANCE_ID=$(curl -s -H "X-aws-ec2-metadata-token: $TOKEN" http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/instance-id)
          IDENTITY=$(curl -s -H "X-aws-ec2-metadata-token: $TOKEN" http://169.254.169.254/latest/dynamic/instance-identity/document)
          REGION=$(echo $IDENTITY | jq -r .region)
          aws ssm update-instance-information --instance-id $INSTANCE_ID --ping-status online --region $REGION || true
          until [[ "$(aws ssm describe-instance-information --instance-information-filter-list "key=InstanceIds,valueSet=$INSTANCE_ID" --region $REGION --query 'InstanceInformationList[0].PingStatus' --output text 2>/dev/null || echo 'failed')" == "Online" ]]; do
            echo "Waiting for SSM Agent to register instance as Online..."
            sleep 10
          done
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal --exit-code 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource BasicSSMInstance --region $REGION
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BasicSSMInstance"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: 'EC2 Instance ID for SSM management'
    Value: !Ref BasicSSMInstance
  PublicIp:
    Description: 'Public IP address of the EC2 instance'
    Value: !GetAtt BasicSSMInstance.PublicIp
  SessionManagerURL:
    Description: 'AWS Console URL to start SSM Session Manager session'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${AWS::Region}.console.aws.amazon.com/systems-manager/session-manager/${!Ref BasicSSMInstance}?region=${AWS::Region}'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an encrypted One Zone EFS file system in the us-east-1a Availability Zone with supporting VPC, public subnet, and security group.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InternetGateway'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet

  EFSMountTargetSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for EFS mount targets allowing inbound NFS (TCP/UDP 2049) from VPC CIDR'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: udp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFSMountTargetSG'

  EFSFileSystem:
    Type: AWS::EFS::FileSystem
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZoneName: !GetAtt PublicSubnet.AvailabilityZone
      Encrypted: true
      PerformanceMode: generalPurpose
      ThroughputMode: bursting
      FileSystemPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: '*'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
      FileSystemTags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFSFileSystem'

  EFSMountTarget:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSMountTargetSG

Outputs:
  EFSFileSystemId:
    Description: 'ID of the encrypted One Zone EFS FileSystem'
    Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFSFileSystemId'

  EFSMountTargetDnsName:
    Description: 'DNS name of the EFS FileSystem'
    Value: !Sub 'fs-${EFSFileSystem}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFSMountTargetDnsName'

  EFSMountTargetIpAddress:
    Description: 'Private IP address of the EFS MountTarget'
    Value: !GetAtt EFSMountTarget.IpAddress
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFSMountTargetIpAddress'

  VPCId:
    Description: 'ID of the VPC hosting the EFS resources'
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deployment of an EC2 instance with ephemeral storage using the latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI.'

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: 'Pre-existing VPC ID (e.g., default VPC).'
  SubnetId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Description: 'Pre-existing Subnet ID in the VPC (e.g., default public subnet).'
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: m5d.large
    Description: 'EC2 instance type (m5d.large supports ephemeral NVMe instance store).'
  KeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Optional. Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to use for SSH access. If not provided, a new KeyPair will be created.'
  SshCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 172.31.0.0/16
    Description: 'Restrictive CIDR for SSH (e.g., VPC range or your IP/32; update post-deploy if needed).'
    AllowedPattern: '^(?:(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)\.){3}(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)(?:/(?:3[0-2]|[12]?\d|0?|[1-9]))?$'

Conditions:
  CreateKeyPair: !Equals
    - !Ref KeyName
    - ''

Resources:
  InstanceKeyPair:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair
    Condition: CreateKeyPair
    Properties:
      KeyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-key'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceKeyPair'

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH access
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SshCidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSecurityGroup'

  InstanceLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-template'
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1}}'
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        KeyName: !If [CreateKeyPair, !Ref InstanceKeyPair, !Ref KeyName]
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !GetAtt InstanceSecurityGroup.GroupId
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeSize: 8
              VolumeType: gp3
              DeleteOnTermination: true
              Encrypted: true
              KmsKeyId: alias/aws/ebs
          - DeviceName: /dev/sdb
            VirtualName: ephemeral0
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: launch-template
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceLaunchTemplate'

  Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateName: !Ref InstanceLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt InstanceLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Instance'

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: 'ID of the EC2 Instance.'
    Value: !Ref Instance
  PublicIp:
    Description: 'Public IP address of the EC2 Instance.'
    Value: !GetAtt Instance.PublicIp
  KeyName:
    Description: 'KeyPair name used for the EC2 Instance.'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for deploying a DynamoDB table for mobile notifications reporting with a global secondary index (GSI) on type and sentTime, on-demand (pay-per-request) capacity, and TTL for automatic cleanup of stale data.

Parameters:
  TableNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: MobileNotificationsReporting

Resources:
  MobileNotificationsTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${TableNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: notificationId
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: type
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: sentTime
          AttributeType: N
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: notificationId
          KeyType: HASH
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        Enabled: true
        AttributeName: ttl
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: TypeSentTimeIndex
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: type
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: sentTime
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MobileNotificationsReporting

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: The name of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Ref MobileNotificationsTable
  TableArn:
    Description: The ARN of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !GetAtt MobileNotificationsTable.Arn
  TypeSentTimeIndexName:
    Description: The name of the TypeSentTimeIndex GSI
    Value: TypeSentTimeIndex

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deployment to default VPC with SSH-enabled EC2 and static EIP.'

Parameters:
  VPCId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: 'Select the region''s default VPC for networking resources'
  SubnetId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Description: 'Select the VPC''s first default public subnet for EC2 placement'
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    NoEcho: false
    Description: 'Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to enable SSH access'
  SSHCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.0.0/16'
    AllowedPattern: '^(?:(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)\.){3}(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)/(?:[0-9]|[12][0-9]|3[0-2])$'
    Description: 'CIDR block to allow SSH access from. Default is everywhere.'
    ConstraintDescription: 'must be a valid CIDR range of the form x.x.x.x/x.'

Mappings:
  AmazonLinuxAMI:
    us-east-1:
      HVM64: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      HVM64: ami-0a0ad6b70e61be944
    us-west-1:
      HVM64: ami-0defa8b3cdefa8b3c
    us-west-2:
      HVM64: ami-0d95806ff5e866dd6
    eu-west-1:
      HVM64: ami-0c7c3e9f8e8f6b123
    eu-central-1:
      HVM64: ami-0a3c7f4b5c6d7e890
    ap-southeast-1:
      HVM64: ami-0b4d8e9f0a1b2c345
    ap-northeast-1:
      HVM64: ami-0e5f6a7b8c9d0e123

Resources:
  MySecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH access
      VpcId: !Ref VPCId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHCidrBlock

  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [AmazonLinuxAMI, !Ref AWS::Region, HVM64]
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref MySecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpEndpoint: enabled
        HttpTokens: required
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeSize: 8
            DeleteOnTermination: true

  MyEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  MyEIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt MyEIP.AllocationId
      InstanceId: !Ref MyEC2Instance

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: 'EC2 instance ID for access'
    Value: !Ref MyEC2Instance
  PublicIp:
    Description: 'Public IP of the EC2 instance'
    Value: !GetAtt MyEC2Instance.PublicIp
  EIP:
    Description: 'Static Elastic IP address'
    Value: !Ref MyEIP

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates a VPC, public subnet, route table, security group, single ENI with one primary and one secondary private IP, two EIPs, and two EIP associations to enable multiple public IPs on one network interface for later EC2 attachment.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIPVPC
        - Key: Project
          Value: MultiIPSetup
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Demo

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIPIGW
        - Key: Project
          Value: MultiIPSetup
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Demo

  GatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIPPublicSubnet
        - Key: Project
          Value: MultiIPSetup
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Demo

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIPRouteTable
        - Key: Project
          Value: MultiIPSetup
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Demo

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: MultiIP ENI SG
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MultiIPSetup
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Demo

  ENI:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkInterface
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.10
      PrivateIpAddresses:
        - PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.11
          Primary: false
      GroupSet:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      Description: MultiIP ENI
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIP-ENI
        - Key: Project
          Value: MultiIPSetup
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Demo

  EIP1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIPEIP1
        - Key: Project
          Value: MultiIPSetup
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Demo

  EIP2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIPEIP2
        - Key: Project
          Value: MultiIPSetup
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Demo

  EIPAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP1.AllocationId
      NetworkInterfaceId: !Ref ENI
      PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.10

  EIPAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP2.AllocationId
      NetworkInterfaceId: !Ref ENI
      PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.11

Outputs:
  ENINetworkInterfaceId:
    Description: NetworkInterfaceId of the ENI
    Value: !Ref ENI
  PrimaryPrivateIp:
    Description: Primary Private IP of the ENI
    Value: 10.0.1.10
  SecondaryPrivateIp:
    Description: Secondary Private IP of the ENI
    Value: 10.0.1.11
  EIP1PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP of the first EIP
    Value: !Ref EIP1
  EIP2PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP of the second EIP
    Value: !Ref EIP2
  SubnetId:
    Description: ID of the public subnet
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: ID of the security group
    Value: !Ref SecurityGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'API Gateway REST API with Lambda non-proxy integration'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  MyLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            return {
              statusCode: 200,
              headers: {
                "Content-Type": "application/json"
              },
              body: JSON.stringify({
                message: 'Hello from Lambda non-proxy!'
              })
            };
          };

  MyRestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: MyRestApi
      Description: My REST API with Lambda non-proxy integration
      BinaryMediaTypes:
        - application/octet-stream
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  GetMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MyRestApi
      ResourceId: !GetAtt MyRestApi.RootResourceId
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub "arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/${MyLambdaFunction.Arn}/invocations"
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: "#set($inputRoot = $input.path('$'))\n{}"

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref MyLambdaFunction
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: apigateway.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${MyRestApi}/prod/*"

  MyDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MyRestApi
    DependsOn: GetMethod

  ProdStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MyRestApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref MyDeployment
      StageName: prod
      MethodSettings:
        - LoggingLevel: INFO
          HttpMethod: GET
          ResourcePath: "/"

Outputs:
  RestApiId:
    Value: !Ref MyRestApi
  RestApiUrl:
    Value: !Sub "https://${MyRestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/"
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Value: !GetAtt MyLambdaFunction.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys AWS Glue Database and Crawler for cataloging CloudTrail logs stored in S3, enabling structured querying via Athena.'

Parameters:
  DatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: cloudtrail_database
    Description: Name of the Glue Database
  CrawlerName:
    Type: String
    Default: cloudtrail_crawler
    Description: Name of the Glue Crawler
  ScheduleExpression:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional cron expression for crawler schedule (e.g., rate(1 day)). Leave empty for on-demand.

Resources:
  GlueCrawlerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: GlueCrawlerRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: InlinePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:GetObjectVersion
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - arn:aws:s3:::kk-admin
                  - arn:aws:s3:::kk-admin/cloud-trail/AWSLogs/*
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - glue:CreateTable
                  - glue:UpdateTable
                  - glue:DeleteTable
                  - glue:GetTable
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:glue:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CloudTrailGlueCrawler
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  CloudTrailDatabase:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Database
    Properties:
      CatalogId: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      DatabaseInput:
        Description: Database for CloudTrail logs

  CloudTrailCrawler:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Crawler
    DependsOn: CloudTrailDatabase
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref CrawlerName
      Role: !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn
      DatabaseName: !Ref DatabaseName
      Description: Crawler for CloudTrail logs
      Targets:
        S3Targets:
          - Path: s3://kk-admin/cloud-trail/AWSLogs/
      TablePrefix: cloudtrail_
      SchemaChangePolicy:
        UpdateBehavior: UPDATE_IN_DATABASE
        DeleteBehavior: DEPRECATE_IN_DATABASE
      RecrawlPolicy:
        RecrawlBehavior: CRAWL_EVERYTHING
      Tags:
        Project: CloudTrailGlueCrawler
        Stack: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

Outputs:
  DatabaseName:
    Description: Name of the Glue Database
    Value: !Ref DatabaseName
  CrawlerName:
    Description: Name of the Glue Crawler
    Value: !Ref CrawlerName
  GlueDatabaseArn:
    Description: ARN of the Glue Database
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:glue:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:catalog/database/${DatabaseName}'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Deploys multi-threshold AWS billing alarms using CloudWatch and SNS to monitor monthly costs with 6-hour evaluations and email notifications on threshold breaches at $5, $10, $20, and $40."

Parameters:
  EmailAddress:
    Type: String
    Default: "xxxxx@gmail.com"
    Description: "Email address for billing alarm notifications."

Resources:
  BillingAlertsKmsKey:
    Type: "AWS::KMS::Key"
    Properties:
      Description: "KMS key for encrypting billing alerts SNS topic"
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: "Enable IAM User Permissions"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: "Allow SNS service"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "sns.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "BillingMonitoring"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

  BillingAlertsTopic:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      DisplayName: "AWS Billing Threshold Alerts"
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref BillingAlertsKmsKey
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "BillingMonitoring"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

  BillingEmailSubscription:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Subscription"
    Properties:
      Protocol: "email"
      Endpoint: !Ref EmailAddress
      TopicArn: !Ref BillingAlertsTopic

  BillingAlarm5:
    Type: "AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm"
    Properties:
      AlarmName: "BillingAlarm5"
      AlarmDescription: "Alert when estimated monthly AWS charges exceed $5"
      Namespace: "AWS/Billing"
      MetricName: "EstimatedCharges"
      Dimensions:
        - Name: "Currency"
          Value: "USD"
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Statistic: "Maximum"
      Threshold: 5
      ComparisonOperator: "GreaterThanThreshold"
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref BillingAlertsTopic
      OKActions: []
      InsufficientDataActions: []
      TreatMissingData: "notBreaching"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "BillingMonitoring"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

  BillingAlarm10:
    Type: "AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm"
    Properties:
      AlarmName: "BillingAlarm10"
      AlarmDescription: "Alert when estimated monthly AWS charges exceed $10"
      Namespace: "AWS/Billing"
      MetricName: "EstimatedCharges"
      Dimensions:
        - Name: "Currency"
          Value: "USD"
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Statistic: "Maximum"
      Threshold: 10
      ComparisonOperator: "GreaterThanThreshold"
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref BillingAlertsTopic
      OKActions: []
      InsufficientDataActions: []
      TreatMissingData: "notBreaching"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "BillingMonitoring"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

  BillingAlarm20:
    Type: "AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm"
    Properties:
      AlarmName: "BillingAlarm20"
      AlarmDescription: "Alert when estimated monthly AWS charges exceed $20"
      Namespace: "AWS/Billing"
      MetricName: "EstimatedCharges"
      Dimensions:
        - Name: "Currency"
          Value: "USD"
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Statistic: "Maximum"
      Threshold: 20
      ComparisonOperator: "GreaterThanThreshold"
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref BillingAlertsTopic
      OKActions: []
      InsufficientDataActions: []
      TreatMissingData: "notBreaching"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "BillingMonitoring"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

  BillingAlarm40:
    Type: "AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm"
    Properties:
      AlarmName: "BillingAlarm40"
      AlarmDescription: "Alert when estimated monthly AWS charges exceed $40"
      Namespace: "AWS/Billing"
      MetricName: "EstimatedCharges"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for integrating DynamoDB streams with EventBridge via Pipes to filter and route PNG avatar updates.'

Parameters:
  TableName:
    Type: String
    Default: AvatarDynamoDBTable
  BusName:
    Type: String
    Default: AvatarEventsBus

Resources:
  AvatarDynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Ref TableName
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: userId
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: userId
          KeyType: HASH
      StreamSpecification:
        StreamViewType: NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES

  AvatarEventsBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref BusName

  EventBridgePipeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: pipes.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DynamoDBStreamAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:ListStreams
                Resource: !GetAtt AvatarDynamoDBTable.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:DescribeStream
                  - dynamodb:GetShardIterator
                  - dynamodb:GetRecords
                Resource: !Sub '${AvatarDynamoDBTable.Arn}/stream/*'
        - PolicyName: EventBridgePutEvents
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: events:PutEvents
                Resource: !GetAtt AvatarEventsBus.Arn

  AvatarPngFilterPipe:
    Type: AWS::Pipes::Pipe
    Properties:
      RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgePipeRole.Arn
      Source: !GetAtt AvatarDynamoDBTable.StreamArn
      SourceParameters:
        DynamoDBStreamParameters:
          BatchSize: 10
          MaximumBatchingWindowInSeconds: 1
          StartingPosition: LATEST
      Target: !GetAtt AvatarEventsBus.Arn
      TargetParameters:
        EventBridgeEventBusParameters:
          Source: custom:avatar-png-detector
          DetailType: AvatarPngUpdated

  AvatarPngFilterRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref AvatarEventsBus
      Description: 'Rule to filter and match only MODIFY events where avatarUrl ends with .png'
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - custom:avatar-png-detector
        detailType:
          - AvatarPngUpdated
        detail:
          eventName:
            - MODIFY
          dynamodb:
            NewImage:
              avatarUrl:
                - S:
                    suffix: .png

Outputs:
  DynamoDBTableName:
    Description: Name of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Ref AvatarDynamoDBTable
  DynamoDBStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB stream
    Value: !GetAtt AvatarDynamoDBTable.StreamArn
  EventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the custom EventBridge EventBus
    Value: !GetAtt AvatarEventsBus.Arn
  PipeName:
    Description: Name of the EventBridge Pipe
    Value: !Ref AvatarPngFilterPipe
  PipeArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Pipe
    Value: !GetAtt AvatarPngFilterPipe.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates an Amazon EventBridge configuration to route custom events to an external API endpoint via HTTPS using API key authentication.'
Metadata:
  Overview: 'Deploys EventBridge EventBus, Connection, ApiDestination, Rule with EventPattern for custom events, and CloudWatch Logs DLQ for failed invocations.'

Parameters:
  EventBusName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'CustomEventBus'
  EndpointUrl:
    Type: String
    Default: 'https://webhook.site/testtest'
  ApiKeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'X-API-Key'
  ApiKeyValue:
    Type: String
    Default: 'test-api-key'
    NoEcho: true
    Description: 'Secure input of the API key value (default for testing)'

Resources:
  CustomEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref EventBusName
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridge-Webhook
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EventBridgeDeadLetterLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/events/${AWS::StackName}-DeadLetter'
      RetentionInDays: 14
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridge-Webhook

  ApiConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ApiConnection'
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: !Ref ApiKeyName
          ApiKeyValue: !Ref ApiKeyValue

  WebhookApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebhookApiDestination'
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt ApiConnection.Arn
      InvocationEndpoint: !Ref EndpointUrl
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10

  RouteCustomEventsRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RouteCustomEventsRule'
      EventBusName: !Ref CustomEventBus
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - prefix: myapp.custom
      Targets:
        - Id: ApiDestinationTarget
          Arn: !GetAtt WebhookApiDestination.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridge-Webhook

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the custom EventBridge EventBus'
    Value: !Ref CustomEventBus
  ConnectionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge Connection'
    Value: !Ref ApiConnection
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge ApiDestination'
    Value: !GetAtt WebhookApiDestination.Arn
  RuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge Rule routing events to the ApiDestination'
    Value: !Ref RouteCustomEventsRule

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a production-ready DynamoDB table with partition key ''pk'' (String), sort key ''sk'' (String), Local Secondary Index ''LsiIndex'' sorted by ''lsiSortKey'' (Number) with KEYS_ONLY projection, and Global Secondary Index ''GsiIndex'' with partition key ''gsiPk'' (String), sort key ''gsiSk'' (String) with ALL projection. Supports PAY_PER_REQUEST (default) or PROVISIONED billing modes, SSE encryption (AWS-managed or custom KMS), PITR enabled (35-day retention), and deletion protection.'

Parameters:
  TableNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'AppTable'
    Description: 'Unique prefix for the DynamoDB table name (e.g., MyApp)'
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 20
  BillingMode:
    Type: String
    Default: PAY_PER_REQUEST
    AllowedValues:
      - PAY_PER_REQUEST
      - PROVISIONED
    Description: 'Billing mode for the table and GSI'
  ReadCapacityUnits:
    Type: Number
    Default: 5
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 40000
    Description: 'Read capacity units for PROVISIONED mode (table and GSI)'
  WriteCapacityUnits:
    Type: Number
    Default: 5
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 40000
    Description: 'Write capacity units for PROVISIONED mode (table and GSI)'
  KMSKeyId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'ARN or alias of a customer managed KMS key for SSE (leave empty for AWS-managed KMS key)'
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: dev
    Description: 'Environment tag (e.g., dev, staging, prod)'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9-]+$'
  Owner:
    Type: String
    Default: Engineering
    Description: 'Owner tag for cost allocation'

Conditions:
  ProvisionedMode: !Equals [!Ref BillingMode, PROVISIONED]
  UseCustomKMS: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KMSKeyId, '']]

Resources:
  DynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${TableNamePrefix}-${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: pk
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: sk
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: lsiSortKey
          AttributeType: N
        - AttributeName: gsiPk
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: gsiSk
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: pk
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: sk
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: !Ref BillingMode
      ProvisionedThroughput:
        Fn::If:
          - ProvisionedMode
          - ReadCapacityUnits: !Ref ReadCapacityUnits
            WriteCapacityUnits: !Ref WriteCapacityUnits
          - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      SSESpecification:
        Fn::If:
          - UseCustomKMS
          - SSEEnabled: true
            SSEType: KMS
            KMSMasterKeyId: !Ref KMSKeyId
          - SSEEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      LocalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: LsiIndex
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: pk
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: lsiSortKey
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: KEYS_ONLY
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: GsiIndex
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: gsiPk
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: gsiSk
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL
          ProvisionedThroughput:
            Fn::If:
              - ProvisionedMode
              - ReadCapacityUnits: !Ref ReadCapacityUnits
                WriteCapacityUnits: !Ref WriteCapacityUnits
              - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${TableNamePrefix}-${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: 'Name of the DynamoDB table'
    Value: !Ref DynamoDBTable
  TableArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DynamoDB table'
    Value: !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.Arn
  LsiIndexName:
    Description: 'Name of the Local Secondary Index'
    Value: LsiIndex
  LsiKeySchema:
    Description: 'Key schema of the LSI (shares partition key pk, range key lsiSortKey)'
    Value: 'pk:HASH, lsiSortKey:RANGE'
  GsiIndexName:
    Description: 'Name of the Global Secondary Index'
    Value: GsiIndex
  GsiKeySchema:
    Description: 'Key schema of the GSI (partition key gsiPk, sort key gsiSk)'
    Value: 'gsiPk:HASH, gsiSk:RANGE'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: |
  Deploys a secure IoT data pipeline that routes messages from AWS IoT Core 'device/data' MQTT topic to an SQS queue via an SNS topic, with dead-letter queue handling, server-side encryption, and error actions for resilience.

Parameters:
  QueueName:
    Type: String
    Default: "IoTDataPipeline-queue"
  TopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: "IoTDataPipeline-topic"
  RuleName:
    Type: String
    Default: "IoTDataPipelineRule"

Resources:
  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "${QueueName}-dlq"
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

  MainQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref QueueName
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 5
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref TopicName
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

  SNSPublishLambdaExecRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-sns-publish-lambda-exec-role"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-sns-publish-lambda-policy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref SNSTopic
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-logs-policy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: "*"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

  SNSPublishLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-sns-publish-lambda"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt SNSPublishLambdaExecRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: !Sub |
          import json
          import boto3
          def handler(event, context):
            sns = boto3.client('sns')
            sns.publish(TopicArn='${SNSTopic}', Message=json.dumps(event))
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

  DLQSendLambdaExecRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-dlq-send-lambda-exec-role"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-sqs-dlq-lambda-policy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sqs:SendMessage
                Resource: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-logs-policy-dlq"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: "*"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

  DLQSendLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-dlq-send-lambda"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt DLQSendLambdaExecRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: !Sub |
          import json
          import boto3
          def handler(event, context):
            sqs = boto3.client('sqs')
            sqs.send_message(QueueUrl='${DeadLetterQueue}', MessageBody=json.dumps(event))
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

  MainIoTRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-iot-sns-role"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - iot.amazonaws.com
                - iot.eclipse.org
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-lambda-invoke-policy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt SNSPublishLambda.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

  ErrorIoTRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-iot-dlq-role"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - iot.amazonaws.com
                - iot.eclipse.org
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-lambda-invoke-dlq-policy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt DLQSendLambda.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

  SNSSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref SNSTopic
      Endpoint: !GetAtt MainQueue.Arn
      Protocol: sqs
      RawMessageDelivery: true
      RedrivePolicy: !Sub '{ "deadLetterTargetArn": "${DeadLetterQueue.Arn}" }'

  IoTRule:
    Type: AWS::IoT::TopicRule
    Properties:
      RuleName: !Ref RuleName
      TopicRulePayload:
        Sql: SELECT * FROM 'device/data'
        Description: !Sub 'IoT Rule to route device/data messages from IoT Core to SNS topic ${TopicName}'
        Actions:
          - Lambda:
              functionArn: !GetAtt SNSPublishLambda.Arn
              roleArn: !GetAtt MainIoTRole.Arn
        ErrorAction:
          Lambda:
            functionArn: !GetAtt DLQSendLambda.Arn
            roleArn: !GetAtt ErrorIoTRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the main SQS queue
    Value: !Ref MainQueue
  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the main SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt MainQueue.Arn
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
  RuleName:
    Description: Name of the IoT Topic Rule
    Value: !Ref RuleName

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates an S3 bucket integrated with Amazon EventBridge and SNS to notify subscribers about object creation events.'

Resources:
  NotificationBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-bucket'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              KMSMasterKeyID: alias/aws/s3
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      NotificationConfiguration:
        EventBridgeConfiguration:
          EventBridgeEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: Notification Bucket

  SNSTopicKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for ${AWS::StackName} SNS topic encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SNS to use KMS
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 'sns.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SNS Topic Encryption Key

  ObjectCreatedTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ObjectCreatedTopic'
      DisplayName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} Object Created Notifications'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SNSTopicKey
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: Object Created Notifications

  ObjectCreatedTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref ObjectCreatedTopic
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !GetAtt S3ObjectCreatedRule.Arn
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
      Topics:
        - !Ref ObjectCreatedTopic

  S3ObjectCreatedRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3ObjectCreatedRule'
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.s3
        'detail-type':
          - 'Object Created (All)'
        detail:
          bucket:
            name:
              - !Ref NotificationBucket
      Targets:
        - Arn: !Ref ObjectCreatedTopic
          Id: SNSTarget
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: S3 Object Created to SNS

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref NotificationBucket
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic'
    Value: !Ref ObjectCreatedTopic
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge rule'
    Value: !GetAtt S3ObjectCreatedRule.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template that creates a real-time data ingestion and storage pipeline using Amazon Kinesis Data Stream and Kinesis Data Firehose, which delivers the data to an S3 bucket.

Parameters:
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10
    Description: Number of shards for the Kinesis Data Stream
  StreamName:
    Type: String
    Default: DataIngestionStream
    Description: Name of the Kinesis Data Stream
  FirehoseName:
    Type: String
    Default: DataFirehose
    Description: Name of the Kinesis Data Firehose Delivery Stream
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: data-ingestion-bucket
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name
  BufferSizeInMBs:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 128
    Description: Buffer size in MBs for Firehose
  BufferIntervalInSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 60
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 900
    Description: Buffer interval in seconds for Firehose

Resources:
  S3EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "CMK for S3 bucket encryption"
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DataIngestionPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  DataBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3EncryptionKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DataIngestionPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  DataBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref DataBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
              - s3:GetObject
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${DataBucket}/*"
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${DataBucket}/year=*/month=*/day=*/hour=*/minute=*/*/*"
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${DataBucket}/FirehoseError/*"

  FirehoseRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: '*'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FirehoseCustomPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:DescribeStream
                  - kinesis:GetShardIterator
                  - kinesis:GetRecords
                  - kinesis:ListShards
                Resource: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject*
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                  - s3:GetObject*
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${DataBucket}/*"
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${DataBucket}/year=*/month=*/day=*/hour=*/minute=*/*/*"
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${DataBucket}/FirehoseError/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/kinesis-firehose/${FirehoseName}:*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:DescribeKey
                Resource: !GetAtt S3EncryptionKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DataIngestionPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  DataStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref StreamName
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: 24
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DataIngestionPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  DataFirehose:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    Properties:
      DeliveryStreamName: !Ref FirehoseName
      DeliveryStreamType: KinesisStreamAsSource
      KinesisStreamSourceConfiguration:
        KinesisStreamARN: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
      ExtendedS3DestinationConfiguration:
        BucketARN: !GetAtt DataBucket.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
        BufferingHints:
          SizeInMBs: !Ref BufferSizeInMBs
          IntervalInSeconds: !Ref BufferIntervalInSeconds
        CompressionFormat: UNCOMPRESSED
        Prefix: "year=!{timestamp:yyyy}/month=!{timestamp:MM}/day=!{timestamp:dd}/hour=!{timestamp:HH}/minute=!{timestamp:mm}/!{timestamp:ss}/"
        CloudWatchLoggingOptions:
          Enabled: true
          LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/kinesis-firehose/${FirehoseName}"
        DynamicPartitioningConfiguration:
          Enabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DataIngestionPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  DataStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Stream for producers to send data
    Value: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
  DataFirehoseArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Firehose Delivery Stream
    Value: !GetAtt DataFirehose.Arn
  DataBucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket where data is stored
    Value: !Ref DataBucket

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure parameter storage and retrieval for serverless apps with SSM Parameter Store and Secrets Manager demonstrating centralized configuration management.

Resources:
  MyConfigParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/config/example"
      Type: String
      Value: "This is A/B"
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
        Project: SecureConfigDemo

  MySecureParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/config/sensitive-key"
      Type: String
      Value: "sensitive-placeholder"
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
        Project: SecureConfigDemo

  AppSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-app-secret"
      GenerateSecretString:
        PasswordLength: 20
        RequireEachIncludedType: true
        ExcludeCharacters: '"@/'
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username": "admin", "password": "{{generate-password}}"}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecureConfigDemo

  LambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaRole"
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: "*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:GetParametersByPath
                Resource: "*"
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    "ssm:Path": !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/config/"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:DescribeParameters
                  - ssm:GetParameter
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${AWS::StackName}/config/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:${AppSecret}"
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecureConfigDemo

  ConfigRetrieverLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ConfigRetriever"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      Environment:
        Variables:
          ConfigPath: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/config/"
          SecretArn: !Ref AppSecret
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              ssm = boto3.client('ssm')
              config_path = os.environ['ConfigPath']
              response = ssm.get_parameters_by_path(
                  Path=config_path,
                  Recursive=True,
                  WithDecryption=True
              )
              print("Retrieved parameters:", json.dumps(response, default=str))

              secrets_client = boto3.client('secretsmanager')
              secret_arn = os.environ['SecretArn']
              secret_response = secrets_client.get_secret_value(SecretId=secret_arn)
              secret = json.loads(secret_response['SecretString'])
              print("Retrieved secret - Username:", secret['username'])
              print("Retrieved secret - Password length:", len(secret['password']))

              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Parameters and secret retrieved successfully!')
              }
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecureConfigDemo

Outputs:
  ConfigParamArn:
    Description: ARN of the non-sensitive SSM Parameter
    Value: !Sub "arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${AWS::StackName}/config/example"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ConfigParamArn"

  SecureParamArn:
    Description: ARN of the sensitive SSM Parameter
    Value: !Sub "arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${AWS::StackName}/config/sensitive-key"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SecureParamArn"

  AppSecretArn:
    Description: ARN of the Secrets Manager Secret
    Value: !Sub "arn:aws:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:${AppSecret}"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-AppSecretArn"

  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda Function
    Value: !GetAtt ConfigRetrieverLambda.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaArn"

  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: Name of the Lambda Function
    Value: !Ref ConfigRetrieverLambda
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaName"

  LambdaRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda IAM Role
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaRoleArn"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Sample Lambda Function'

Resources:
  LambdaSampleRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: LambdaSampleRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: LambdaSample

  SampleLambda:
    Type: 'AWS::Lambda::Function'
    Properties:
      FunctionName: SampleLambda
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaSampleRole.Arn
      Timeout: 3
      MemorySize: 128
      EphemeralStorage:
        Size: 512
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def handler(event, context):
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': 'Hello from Lambda!'
              }
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: LambdaSample

Outputs:
  FunctionName:
    Description: Lambda Function Name
    Value: !Ref SampleLambda
  FunctionArn:
    Description: Lambda Function ARN
    Value: !GetAtt SampleLambda.Arn

      Tags:

          Value: EC2-IAM-ReadOnly-Access

    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:

            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMReadOnlyAccess
