final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a customer-managed KMS key for centralized encryption management across AWS services and resources, with an associated alias.'

Parameters:
  KeyAliasPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: central-encryption-key
    Description: 'Prefix for the KMS key alias (full alias: alias/KeyAliasPrefix).'

Resources:
  CentralEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'Customer managed KMS key for centralized encryption across AWS services and resources.'
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      PendingWindowInDays: 30
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root full access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow services to use key'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - s3.amazonaws.com
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
                - rds.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
              - kms:CreateGrant
              - kms:RetireGrant
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Key'
          Value: 'encryption'
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'centralized-management'
        - Key: 'Stack'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  CentralEncryptionAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      TargetKeyId: !Ref CentralEncryptionKey
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${KeyAliasPrefix}'

Outputs:
  KeyId:
    Description: 'ID of the KMS key'
    Value: !Ref CentralEncryptionKey
  KeyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the KMS key'
    Value: !GetAtt CentralEncryptionKey.Arn
  AliasName:
    Description: 'Name of the KMS key alias'
    Value: !Ref CentralEncryptionAlias

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Deploys a private Route 53 Hosted Zone for internal DNS management within a VPC supporting the domain www.example.com"

Parameters:
  DomainName:
    Type: String
    Default: "www.example.com."
  VpcCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Default: "10.0.0.0/16"

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"

  PrivateHostedZone:
    Type: AWS::Route53::HostedZone
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${DomainName}."
      VPCs:
        - VPCId: !Ref VPC
          VPCRegion: !Ref "AWS::Region"
      HostedZoneTags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-hostedzone"

Outputs:
  HostedZoneId:
    Value: !Ref PrivateHostedZone
  NameServers:
    Value: !Join [", ", !GetAtt PrivateHostedZone.NameServers]
  VpcId:
    Value: !Ref VPC

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys an Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster with two publicly accessible db.t3.large instances for redundancy, custom parameter groups, in a VPC with public subnets.'

Parameters:
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: 'admin'
    MinLength: '1'
    AllowedPattern: '[a-zA-Z0-9]+'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must be alphanumeric only.'
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'mydb'
    MinLength: '1'
  BackupRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: '1'
    MaxValue: '35'
    Default: '7'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - '0'
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - '1'
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} Aurora public subnets'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBSubnetGroup'

  DBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Aurora MySQL access on port 3306
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBSG'

  ClusterParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBClusterParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} custom cluster parameter group'
      Family: aurora-mysql8.0
      Parameters:
        time_zone: UTC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ClusterParamGroup'

  InstanceParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} custom instance parameter group'
      Family: aurora-mysql8.0
      Parameters:
        sql_mode: 'STRICT_TRANS_TABLES,NO_ZERO_DATE,NO_ZERO_IN_DATE,ERROR_FOR_DIVISION_BY_ZERO'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceParamGroup'

  DBCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    Properties:
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-cluster'
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      DatabaseName: !Ref DBName
      ManageMasterUserPassword: true
      KmsKeyId: !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:alias/aws/rds'
      StorageEncrypted: true
      DeletionProtection: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: !Ref BackupRetentionPeriod
      PreferredBackupWindow: 03:00-04:00
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: Sun:23:00-Sun:23:30
      DBClusterParameterGroupName: !Ref ClusterParameterGroup
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref DBSecurityGroup

  WriterInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref DBCluster
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Writer'
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref DBSecurityGroup
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref InstanceParameterGroup

  ReaderInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref DBCluster
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Reader1'
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref DBSecurityGroup
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref InstanceParameterGroup

Outputs:
  DBClusterEndpointAddress:
    Description: The endpoint address for the Aurora DB cluster (writer/primary)
    Value: !GetAtt DBCluster.Endpoint.Address
  DBClusterReaderEndpointAddress:
    Description: The reader endpoint address for the Aurora DB cluster
    Value: !GetAtt DBCluster.ReadEndpoint.Address
  WriterInstanceEndpointAddress:
    Description: The endpoint address for the writer DB instance
    Value: !GetAtt WriterInstance.Endpoint.Address
  ReaderInstanceEndpointAddress:
    Description: The endpoint address for the reader DB instance
    Value: !GetAtt ReaderInstance.Endpoint.Address
  MasterUserSecretArn:
    Description: The ARN of the Secrets Manager secret containing the master user password
    Value: !GetAtt DBCluster.MasterUserSecret.SecretArn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: Deploys a multi-AZ publicly accessible Aurora MySQL cluster with CloudWatch error log exports.

Parameters:
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: admin
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: mydatabase
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-igw"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-1"

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-2"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-rt"

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Subnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  Subnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  DBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow MySQL/Aurora access from anywhere
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-db-sg"

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnets for Aurora cluster spanning multiple AZs
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup"

  RdsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: CMK for Aurora encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow use of the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: rds.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds-kms"

  DBCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    Properties:
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      EngineVersion: 8.0.mysql_aurora.3.12.0
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-cluster"
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      MasterUserPassword: '{{resolve:ssm-secure:MasterUserPassword:1}}'
      DatabaseName: !Ref DBName
      StorageEncrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: !Ref RdsKmsKey
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      EnableCloudwatchLogsExports:
        - error
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-cluster"

  DBPrimaryInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-primary"
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref DBCluster
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref DBSecurityGroup
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-primary"

  DBReaderInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-reader"
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref DBCluster
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref DBSecurityGroup
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      PromotionTier: 10
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-reader"

Outputs:
  ClusterEndpoint:
    Description: Aurora Cluster Writer Endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt DBCluster.Endpoint.Address
  ReaderEndpoint:
    Description: Aurora Reader Endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt DBCluster.ReadEndpoint.Address
  DBSubnetGroupName:
    Description: DB Subnet Group Name
    Value: !Ref DBSubnetGroup

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a simple Node.js 20.x Lambda function that prints 'hello world'

Resources:
  HelloWorldLambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: HelloWorldLambdaExecutionRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  HelloWorldFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: HelloWorldFunction
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt HelloWorldLambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            console.log('hello world');
            return {
              statusCode: 200,
              body: JSON.stringify('hello world')
            };
          };
      Timeout: 3
      MemorySize: 128
      ReservedConcurrentExecutions: 10

Outputs:
  HelloWorldFunctionName:
    Description: The name of the Lambda function for invocation and integration references
    Value: !Ref HelloWorldFunction
  HelloWorldFunctionArn:
    Description: The ARN of the Lambda function for invocation and integration references
    Value: !GetAtt HelloWorldFunction.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a VPC with a single public subnet, internet gateway, and associated routing infrastructure, designed to enable internet accessibility for resources while providing foundational networking for demonstrations like CloudWatch EC2 auto-alarms.'
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'DemoVPC-${AWS::StackName}'
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'DemoIGW-${AWS::StackName}'
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'PublicSubnet-${AWS::StackName}'
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'PublicRouteTable-${AWS::StackName}'
  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: 'VPC ID'
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VpcId'
  PublicSubnetId:
    Description: 'Public Subnet ID'
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetId'
  PublicRouteTableId:
    Description: 'Public Route Table ID'
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTableId'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates an Amazon S3 bucket accessible to an entire AWS Organization, specific Organizational Unit, or single deploying account based on input parameters for flexible enterprise-wide or single-account sharing.'

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: org-shared
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: AWS Organization ID for enterprise-wide access (e.g., o-1234567890)
  OrganizationalUnitPath:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: OU path like ou-abc123/ou-def456 for unit-specific access
  EnableVersioning:
    Type: String
    Default: "true"
    Description: Enable bucket versioning (true/false)

Conditions:
  SingleAccountOnly: !And
    - !Equals [!Ref OrganizationId, '']
    - !Equals [!Ref OrganizationalUnitPath, '']
  OrgWideAccess: !And
    - !Not [!Equals [!Ref OrganizationId, '']]
    - !Equals [!Ref OrganizationalUnitPath, '']
  VersioningEnabled: !Equals [!Ref EnableVersioning, "true"]

Resources:
  SharedBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}'
      VersioningConfiguration: !If
        - VersioningEnabled
        - Status: Enabled
        - Status: Suspended
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:key/aws/s3'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Shared
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  SharedBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref SharedBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          # Deny non-HTTPS transport
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt SharedBucket.Arn
              - !Join ['', [!GetAtt [SharedBucket, Arn], '/*']]
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          # Conditional Allow Statement
          - !If
            - SingleAccountOnly
            - Sid: AllowSingleAccountAccess
              Effect: Allow
              Principal:
                AWS: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              Action:
                - s3:GetObject
                - s3:PutObject
                - s3:ListBucket
                - s3:DeleteObject
              Resource:
                - !GetAtt SharedBucket.Arn
                - !Join ['', [!GetAtt [SharedBucket, Arn], '/*']]
            - !If
              - OrgWideAccess
              - Sid: AllowOrgWideAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Principal:
                  AWS: '*'
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt SharedBucket.Arn
                  - !Join ['', [!GetAtt [SharedBucket, Arn], '/*']]
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'aws:PrincipalOrgID':
                      - !Ref OrganizationId
              - Sid: AllowOuAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Principal:
                  AWS: '*'
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt SharedBucket.Arn
                  - !Join ['', [!GetAtt [SharedBucket, Arn], '/*']]
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    'aws:PrincipalOrgPaths':
                      - !Sub '${OrganizationId}/${OrganizationalUnitPath}/*'
          # Fallback Deny Statement for non-matching principals
          - !If
            - SingleAccountOnly
            - Sid: DenyNonAccountAccess
              Effect: Deny
              Principal: '*'
              Action:
                - s3:GetObject
                - s3:PutObject
                - s3:ListBucket
                - s3:DeleteObject
              Resource:
                - !GetAtt SharedBucket.Arn
                - !Join ['', [!GetAtt [SharedBucket, Arn], '/*']]
              Condition:
                StringNotEquals:
                  'aws:PrincipalAccount': !Ref AWS::AccountId
            - !If
              - OrgWideAccess
              - Sid: DenyNonOrgAccess
                Effect: Deny
                Principal: '*'
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt SharedBucket.Arn
                  - !Join ['', [!GetAtt [SharedBucket, Arn], '/*']]
                Condition:
                  StringNotEquals:
                    'aws:PrincipalOrgID':
                      - !Ref OrganizationId
              - Sid: DenyNonOuAccess
                Effect: Deny
                Principal: '*'
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt SharedBucket.Arn
                  - !Join ['', [!GetAtt [SharedBucket, Arn], '/*']]
                Condition:
                  StringNotLike:
                    'aws:PrincipalOrgPaths':
                      - !Sub '${OrganizationId}/${OrganizationalUnitPath}/*'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the shared S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref SharedBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN for bucket policy references
    Value: !GetAtt SharedBucket.Arn
  AccessInstructions:
    Description: Instructions for access configuration
    Value: 'Provide OrganizationId (e.g., o-1234567890) for entire AWS Organization access or OrganizationalUnitPath (e.g., ou-abc123/ou-def456) for OU-specific access. Leave both empty for single-account use only.'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template creating a VPC, Security Group, S3 Bucket with policy, and DynamoDB Table with deletion protection, following AWS best practices.'

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  MySecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group with no inbound rules and outbound HTTPS only
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: !GetAtt MyVPC.CidrBlock

  MyS3KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 access to key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                kms:ViaService: !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  MyS3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-bucket"
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref MyS3KMSKey

  MyS3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref MyS3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${MyS3Bucket.Arn}/*'
              - !Sub '${MyS3Bucket.Arn}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  MyDynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-table'
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: PartitionKey
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: SortKey
          KeyType: RANGE
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: PartitionKey
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: SortKey
          AttributeType: N

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Multi-AZ VPC with two public and two private subnets across two AZs, public and private route tables, and internet routing for public subnets.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet1

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet2

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.64.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet1

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.65.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet2

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable'

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

  PublicSubnetIds:
    Description: List of Public Subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetIds'

  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Description: List of Private Subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PrivateSubnet1, !Ref PrivateSubnet2]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetIds'

  PublicRouteTableId:
    Description: Public Route Table ID
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTableId'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'ECS Fargate Task Definition for NGINX with ECS Exec support, IAM roles, and CloudWatch Logs with 7-day retention'

Resources:
  FargateTaskExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FargateTaskExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                ecs:RunTaskException: 'enabled'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy

  NginxLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: /ecs/nginx-task
      RetentionInDays: 7

  FargateTaskRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FargateTaskRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                ecs:RunTaskException: 'enabled'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: NGINXTaskSSMPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssmmessages:CreateControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:CreateDataChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenDataChannel
                Resource: '*'

  NginxTaskDefinition:
    Type: AWS::ECS::TaskDefinition
    Properties:
      Family: nginx-task
      RequiresCompatibilities:
        - FARGATE
      NetworkMode: awsvpc
      Cpu: '256'
      Memory: '512'
      RuntimePlatform:
        OperatingSystemFamily: LINUX
        CpuArchitecture: X86_64
      TaskRoleArn: !GetAtt FargateTaskRole.Arn
      ExecutionRoleArn: !GetAtt FargateTaskExecutionRole.Arn
      ContainerDefinitions:
        - Name: nginx
          Image: nginx:latest
          Essential: true
          PortMappings:
            - ContainerPort: 80
              Protocol: tcp
          LogConfiguration:
            LogDriver: awslogs
            Options:
              awslogs-group: !Ref NginxLogGroup
              awslogs-region: !Ref AWS::Region
              awslogs-stream-prefix: nginx
          ReadonlyRootFilesystem: false

Outputs:
  TaskDefinitionArn:
    Value: !Ref NginxTaskDefinition
  TaskRoleArn:
    Value: !GetAtt FargateTaskRole.Arn
  TaskExecutionRoleArn:
    Value: !GetAtt FargateTaskExecutionRole.Arn
  LogGroupName:
    Value: !Ref NginxLogGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for tiered IAM roles to manage AWS Fault Injection Simulator (FIS) access controls: Security Admins (full access), Admins (full except prod), Users (limited except prod), Non-Users (deny FIS).'
Parameters:
  WorkshopRolePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: FISWorkshop
    Description: 'Prefix for workshop-specific service roles (e.g., FISWorkshopRole) that can be passed to FIS'
Resources:
  FISSecurityAdminRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: FISSecurityAdminRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ConditionalPassRoleToFIS
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: ConditionalPassRoleToFIS
                Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::*:role/${WorkshopRolePrefix}*'
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    'iam:PassedToService': 'fis.amazonaws.com'
        - PolicyName: FullFISAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: FullFISAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: CreateFISServiceLinkedRole
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: CreateFISServiceLinkedRole
                Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::*:role/aws-service-role/fis.amazonaws.com/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FISAccessControl
        - Key: Tier
          Value: SecurityAdmin
  FISAdminRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: FISAdminRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ConditionalPassRoleToFIS
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: ConditionalPassRoleToFIS
                Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::*:role/${WorkshopRolePrefix}*'
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    'iam:PassedToService': 'fis.amazonaws.com'
        - PolicyName: AdminFISAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: AdminFISAllow
                Effect: Allow
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: DenyProdFIS
                Effect: Deny
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'aws:ResourceTag/Environment': 'prod'
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FISAccessControl
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Admin
  FISUserRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: FISUserRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ConditionalPassRoleToFIS
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: ConditionalPassRoleToFIS
                Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::*:role/${WorkshopRolePrefix}*'
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    'iam:PassedToService': 'fis.amazonaws.com'
        - PolicyName: UserFISAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: UserFISAllow
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - fis:StartExperiment
                  - fis:StopExperiment
                  - 'fis:List*'
                  - 'fis:Get*'
                  - fis:TagResource
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: DenyProdFIS
                Effect: Deny
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'aws:ResourceTag/Environment': 'prod'
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FISAccessControl
        - Key: Tier
          Value: User
  FISNonUserRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: FISNonUserRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ConditionalPassRoleToFIS
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: ConditionalPassRoleToFIS
                Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::*:role/${WorkshopRolePrefix}*'
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    'iam:PassedToService': 'fis.amazonaws.com'
        - PolicyName: DenyFISAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: DenyFISAccess
                Effect: Deny
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FISAccessControl
        - Key: Tier
          Value: NonUser
Outputs:
  FISSecurityAdminRole:
    Description: 'ARN of the FISSecurityAdminRole for full FIS access, role passing, and service-linked role creation'
    Value: !GetAtt FISSecurityAdminRole.Arn
  FISAdminRole:
    Description: 'ARN of the FISAdminRole for full FIS access except production environments'
    Value: !GetAtt FISAdminRole.Arn
  FISUserRole:
    Description: 'ARN of the FISUserRole for limited FIS actions (start/stop/list/get/tag) except production'
    Value: !GetAtt FISUserRole.Arn
  FISNonUserRole:
    Description: 'ARN of the FISNonUserRole for read-only AWS access with explicit deny on all FIS actions'
    Value: !GetAtt FISNonUserRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Environment-specific DynamoDB tables for supporter product data with PROD provisioned capacity and auto-scaling, CODE on-demand"

Parameters:
  Stage:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ["PROD", "CODE"]
    Default: "CODE"
    ConstraintDescription: "Environment must be PROD or CODE."

Conditions:
  IsProd: !Equals [!Ref Stage, "PROD"]

Resources:
  SupporterProductDataTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "SupporterProductData-${Stage}"
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: "SupporterId"
          AttributeType: "S"
        - AttributeName: "ProductId"
          AttributeType: "S"
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: "SupporterId"
          KeyType: "HASH"
        - AttributeName: "ProductId"
          KeyType: "RANGE"
      BillingMode: !If [IsProd, "PROVISIONED", "PAY_PER_REQUEST"]
      ProvisionedThroughput: !If
        - IsProd
        - ReadCapacityUnits: 20
          WriteCapacityUnits: 5
        - !Ref "AWS::NoValue"
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        Enabled: true
        AttributeName: "expiryDate"
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref Stage
        - Key: "Backup"
          Value: "true"
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "SupporterProductData-${Stage}"

  WriteScalableTarget:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalableTarget
    Condition: IsProd
    Properties:
      ResourceId: !Sub "table/${SupporterProductDataTable}"
      ScalableDimension: "dynamodb:table:WriteCapacityUnits"
      MinCapacity: 5
      MaxCapacity: 500
      ServiceNamespace: "dynamodb"

  WriteScalingPolicy:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Condition: IsProd
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub "${Stage}-WriteScaling"
      PolicyType: "TargetTrackingScaling"
      ScalingTargetId: !Ref WriteScalableTarget
      TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration:
        PredefinedMetricSpecification:
          PredefinedMetricType: "DynamoDBWriteCapacityUtilization"
        TargetValue: 70.0
        ScaleOutCooldown: 60
        ScaleInCooldown: 60

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Value: !Ref SupporterProductDataTable
  TableArn:
    Value: !GetAtt SupporterProductDataTable.Arn
  Stage:
    Value: !Ref Stage

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to create an EC2 IPAM for centralized IP address allocation management with private and public scopes.'

Resources:
  MyIPAM:
    Type: AWS::EC2::IPAM
    Properties:
      Description: IPAM for centralized IP address allocation management
      OperatingRegions:
        - RegionName: !Ref AWS::Region
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MyIPAM'

  PrivateScope:
    Type: AWS::EC2::IPAMScope
    Properties:
      IpamId: !Ref MyIPAM
      IpamScopeType: private
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateScope'

  PublicScope:
    Type: AWS::EC2::IPAMScope
    Properties:
      IpamId: !Ref MyIPAM
      IpamScopeType: public
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicScope'

Outputs:
  IPAMId:
    Description: IPAM ID for cross-stack references
    Value: !Ref MyIPAM
    Export:
      Name: IPAMId

  IPAMArn:
    Description: IPAM ARN for cross-stack references
    Value: !GetAtt MyIPAM.Arn
    Export:
      Name: IPAMArn

  PrivateScopeId:
    Description: Default Private Scope ID for cross-stack references (e.g., VPCs or subnets)
    Value: !Ref PrivateScope
    Export:
      Name: PrivateScopeId

  PublicScopeId:
    Description: Default Public Scope ID for cross-stack references (e.g., VPCs or subnets)
    Value: !Ref PublicScope
    Export:
      Name: PublicScopeId

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "CloudFormation template for creating three IAM managed policies: S3 access for iOS app, and protection policies for DynamoDB and RDS to prevent destructive operations."

Resources:
  S3AccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: S3AccessPolicy
      Description: Grants read/write access to the ios-apps.sagebridge.org S3 bucket for iOS application
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
            Resource:
              - "arn:aws:s3:::ios-apps.sagebridge.org"
              - "arn:aws:s3:::ios-apps.sagebridge.org/*"

  DynamoDBProtectionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: DynamoDBProtectionPolicy
      Description: Denies deletion and schema modification actions on DynamoDB tables
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - dynamodb:DeleteTable
              - dynamodb:UpdateTable
            Resource: "*"

  RDSProtectionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: RDSProtectionPolicy
      Description: Denies destructive operations on RDS instances and clusters
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - rds:DeleteDBInstance
              - rds:DeleteDBCluster
            Resource: "*"

Outputs:
  S3AccessPolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 Access Policy
    Value: !GetAtt S3AccessPolicy.PolicyArn
  DynamoDBProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB Protection Policy
    Value: !GetAtt DynamoDBProtectionPolicy.PolicyArn
  RDSProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the RDS Protection Policy

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to create an IAM role assumable only by the Bedrock service (bedrock.amazonaws.com) within the same AWS account. The role grants permissions to invoke Bedrock foundation models, Bedrock agents, and Lambda functions for Bedrock agent workflows and custom logic integration.'

Resources:
  BedrockAgentServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: BedrockAgentServiceRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: bedrock.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BedrockAgentPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - bedrock:InvokeModel
                  - bedrock:InvokeAgent
                Resource:
                  - "arn:aws:bedrock:*:*:foundation-model/*"
                  - "arn:aws:bedrock:*:*:agent/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BedrockAgentServiceRole

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Bedrock Agent Service Role
    Value: !GetAtt BedrockAgentServiceRole.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Tag-based Resource Group for production workloads across EC2, RDS, SageMaker, SSM, and related services

Parameters:
  TagKey:
    Type: String
    Default: Environment
  TagValue:
    Type: String
    Default: Production
  ResourceTypeFilters:
    Type: String
    Default: AWS::EC2::Instance,AWS::RDS::DBInstance,AWS::SageMaker::NotebookInstance,AWS::SSM::ManagedInstanceInventory

Resources:
  ProductionResourceGroup:
    Type: AWS::ResourceGroups::Group
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Group'
      ResourceQuery:
        Type: TAG_FILTERS_1_0
        Query:
          Fn::Sub:
            - '{"TagFilters":[{"Key":"${TagKey}","Values":["${TagValue}"]}],"ResourceTypeFilters":[${RTF}]}'
            - TagKey: !Ref TagKey
              TagValue: !Ref TagValue
              RTF:
                Fn::Join:
                  - '","'
                  - !Split[',',!Ref ResourceTypeFilters]
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref TagValue
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

Outputs:
  GroupName:
    Value: !Ref ProductionResourceGroup
  GroupArn:
    Value: !GetAtt ProductionResourceGroup.Arn
  QueryString:
    Value:
      Fn::Sub:
        - '{"TagFilters":[{"Key":"${TagKey}","Values":["${TagValue}"]}],"ResourceTypeFilters":[${RTF}]}'
        - TagKey: !Ref TagKey
          TagValue: !Ref TagValue
          RTF:
            Fn::Join:
              - '","'
              - !Split[',',!Ref ResourceTypeFilters]

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates an encrypted S3 bucket (ALBAccessLogsBucket) for ALB access logs storage with private access, enforced bucket ownership, 90-day lifecycle deletion, and compliant bucket policy for AWS ELB logging.'

Resources:
  ALBAccessLogsBucketKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for ALB access logs bucket encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowELBAccountsKMS
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - 'arn:aws:iam::127311923021:root'
                - 'arn:aws:iam::033776778936:root'
                - 'arn:aws:iam::438205199210:root'
                - 'arn:aws:iam::099214281305:root'
                - 'arn:aws:iam::647129434436:root'
                - 'arn:aws:iam::754195010572:root'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowDeliveryLogsKMS
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ALBAccessLogsBucketKey
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ALB Access Logs

  ALBAccessLogsBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName:
        Fn::Sub:
          - '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-alb-access-logs-${LowerStack}'
          - LowerStack:
              Fn::Lower:
                - Ref: AWS::StackName
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucketKey.Arn
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: DeleteOldLogs
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 90
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ALBAccessLogsBucket
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ALB Access Logs

  ALBAccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowELBLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - 'arn:aws:iam::127311923021:root'
                - 'arn:aws:iam::033776778936:root'
                - 'arn:aws:iam::438205199210:root'
                - 'arn:aws:iam::099214281305:root'
                - 'arn:aws:iam::647129434436:root'
                - 'arn:aws:iam::754195010572:root'
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*'
          - Sid: AllowDeliveryLogsService
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': bucket-owner-full-control
          - Sid: RequireSecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the ALBAccessLogsBucket
    Value: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the ALBAccessLogsBucket
    Value: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn
  BucketDomainName:
    Description: Domain name of the ALBAccessLogsBucket for ALB logging configuration
    Value: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.DomainName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for multi-account AWS Macie enablement with automated sensitive data discovery and security monitoring across AWS accounts.

Parameters:
  FindingsBucketName:
    Type: String
    Description: Unique prefix for the S3 findings bucket name (must be globally unique)
  KmsKeyId:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of an existing KMS key used to encrypt objects in the findings bucket
  PublishingFrequency:
    Type: String
    Default: FIFTEEN_MINUTES
    AllowedValues:
      - FIFTEEN_MINUTES
      - ONE_HOUR
      - SIX_HOURS
    Description: Frequency for publishing Macie findings

Resources:
  FindingsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${FindingsBucketName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      ObjectLockConfiguration:
        ObjectLockEnabled: Enabled
        Rule:
          DefaultRetention:
            Days: 365
            Mode: COMPLIANCE
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref KmsKeyId
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: !Ref AWS::StackName
          Value: true

  FindingsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FindingsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowMacieFindingsPut
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: macie.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub "${FindingsBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: true
          - Sid: AllowMacieFindingsGetBucketAcl
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: macie.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:GetBucketAcl
            Resource: !Sub "${FindingsBucket.Arn}"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: true

  MacieSession:
    Type: AWS::Macie::Session
    Properties:
      Status: ENABLED
      FindingPublishingFrequency: !Ref PublishingFrequency

  HighRiskFindingsFilter:
    Type: AWS::Macie::FindingsFilter
    DependsOn: MacieSession
    Properties:
      Name: HighRiskFindings
      Description: Filter for high and critical policy findings
      FindingCriteria:
        Criterion:
          policyFindings:
            severity:
              description:
                eq:
                  - Critical
                  - High
      Action: ARCHIVE
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: !Ref AWS::StackName
          Value: true

  AllFindingsFilter:
    Type: AWS::Macie::FindingsFilter
    DependsOn: MacieSession
    Properties:
      Name: AllFindings
      Description: Filter to capture all findings
      FindingCriteria:
        Criterion:
          policyFindings:
            severity:
              description:
                neq:
                  - Low
                  - Medium
      Action: NOOP
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: !Ref AWS::StackName
          Value: true

Outputs:
  FindingsBucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for Macie findings
    Value: !Ref FindingsBucket
  FindingsBucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket for Macie findings
    Value: !GetAtt FindingsBucket.Arn
  MacieAccountId:
    Description: ID of the Macie account
    Value: !Ref MacieSession
  HighRiskFindingsFilterArn:
    Description: ARN of the HighRiskFindings filter
    Value: !GetAtt HighRiskFindingsFilter.Arn
  AllFindingsFilterArn:
    Description: ARN of the AllFindings filter
    Value: !GetAtt AllFindingsFilter.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Secure and cost-optimized S3 bucket for storing CloudWatch export data with configurable versioning and automated lifecycle management."

Parameters:
  BucketNameSuffix:
    Type: String
    Default: exports
  EnableVersioning:
    Type: String
    Default: "Yes"
    AllowedValues:
      - "Yes"
      - "No"
  TransitionToIA:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
  TransitionToGlacier:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
  ExpireNoncurrent:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365

Conditions:
  VersioningEnabledCondition: !Equals [!Ref EnableVersioning, "Yes"]

Resources:
  CloudWatchExportsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-cloudwatch-${BucketNameSuffix}-${AWS::StackName}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: "AES256"
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status:
          Fn::If:
            - VersioningEnabledCondition
            - "Enabled"
            - "Suspended"
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: CloudWatchExportsLifecycle
            Status: "Enabled"
            Transitions:
              - {TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToIA,StorageClass:"STANDARD_IA"}
              - {TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToGlacier,StorageClass:"GLACIER"}
            NoncurrentVersionExpiration:
              NoncurrentDays: !Ref ExpireNoncurrent
            AbortIncompleteMultipartUpload:
              DaysAfterInitiation: 7
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CloudWatchExports
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref CloudWatchExportsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "s3:*"
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt CloudWatchExportsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${CloudWatchExportsBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              "Bool":
                "aws:SecureTransport": "false"
          - Sid: DenyUnencrypted
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  CloudFormation template for a publicly accessible S3 bucket used for Lambda artifacts and static assets
  distribution, with customer-managed KMS encryption key featuring automatic rotation, granular permissions,
  and key alias.
Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'lambda-artifacts'
    Description: Prefix for the unique S3 bucket name (e.g., my-lambda-artifacts)
  KeyAliasName:
    Type: String
    Default: alias/lambda-artifacts-key
    Description: Alias name for the KMS key (must start with 'alias/')
  ServiceRoleArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: ARN of the imported IAM service role granted usage permissions on the KMS key for S3 operations
Conditions:
  ServiceRoleProvided:
    !Not
    - !Equals
      - !Ref ServiceRoleArn
      - ''
Resources:
  LambdaArtifactsKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for encrypting Lambda artifacts S3 bucket
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowRootAdmin
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - !If
            - ServiceRoleProvided
            - Sid: AllowServiceRoleUsage
              Effect: Allow
              Principal:
                AWS: !Ref ServiceRoleArn
              Action:
                - kms:Encrypt
                - kms:Decrypt
                - kms:ReEncrypt*
                - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                - kms:DescribeKey
                - kms:CreateGrant
                - kms:RetireGrant
              Resource: '*'
              Condition:
                StringEquals:
                  'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.${AWS::AccountId}.amazonaws.com'
                  'kms:EncryptionContext:aws:s3:arn': !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}/*'
            - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
          - Sid: AllowS3Service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.${AWS::AccountId}.amazonaws.com'
                'kms:EncryptionContext:aws:s3:arn': !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: LambdaArtifacts
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
  LambdaKeyAlias:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Alias'
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Ref KeyAliasName
      TargetKeyId: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKey
  LambdaArtifactsBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: LambdaArtifacts
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
  LambdaArtifactsBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LambdaArtifactsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: PublicReadGetObject
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:GetObject'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LambdaArtifactsBucket}/*'
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LambdaArtifactsBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LambdaArtifactsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: DenySSE-S3
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:PutObjectAcl'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LambdaArtifactsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': AES256
          - Sid: DenyIncorrectKMSKey
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:PutObjectAcl'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LambdaArtifactsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': aws:kms
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.${AWS::AccountId}.amazonaws.com'
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption-aws-kms-key-id': !GetAtt LambdaArtifactsKey.Arn
              StringLike:
                'kms:EncryptionContext:aws:s3:arn': !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LambdaArtifactsBucket}/*'
Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaArtifactsBucket.Arn
  KMSKeyId:
    Description: ID of the KMS key
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKey
  KMSKeyAliasArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key alias
    Value: !Ref LambdaKeyAlias

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM Role for AWS Service Catalog to enable secure provisioning and management of S3 buckets, Lambda functions, IAM resources, CloudFormation stacks, and SNS topics in end-to-end resource deployment workflows.

Resources:
  ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: servicecatalog.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3FullAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AWSLambdaExecute
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ServiceCatalogOperationsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - servicecatalog:ProvisionProduct
                  - servicecatalog:UpdateProvisionedProduct
                  - servicecatalog:TerminateProvisionedProduct
                  - servicecatalog:DescribeProvisionedProduct
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: IAMManagementPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:CreateRole
                  - iam:DeleteRole
                  - iam:GetRole
                  - iam:UpdateRole
                  - iam:AttachRolePolicy
                  - iam:DetachRolePolicy
                  - iam:PassRole
                  - iam:CreatePolicy
                  - iam:DeletePolicy
                  - iam:GetPolicy
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: LambdaLifecyclePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:CreateFunction
                  - lambda:UpdateFunctionCode
                  - lambda:UpdateFunctionConfiguration
                  - lambda:DeleteFunction
                  - lambda:GetFunction
                  - lambda:ListFunctions
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                  - lambda:AddPermission
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: CloudFormationOperationsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:CreateStack
                  - cloudformation:UpdateStack
                  - cloudformation:DeleteStack
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStacks
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackEvents
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackResources
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: SNSIntegrationPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:CreateTopic
                  - sns:DeleteTopic
                  - sns:GetTopicAttributes
                  - sns:SetTopicAttributes
                  - sns:Subscribe
                  - sns:Unsubscribe
                  - sns:Publish
                  - sns:ListSubscriptionsByTopic
                Resource: '*'
      RoleName: ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole
      Path: "/"
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ServiceCatalogProvisioning
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

Outputs:
  ServiceCatalogProvisioningRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Service Catalog Provisioning Role
    Value: !GetAtt ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole.Arn

        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow

            Action: sts:AssumeRole

        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt ImageBuilderInstanceRole.Arn
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Owner
          Value: u12345678@anu.edu.au

  ImageBuilderKMSKeyAlias:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Alias'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Provisions a secure S3 bucket for VPC flow logs with lifecycle management and strict access controls.

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: '^$|^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]{1,61}[a-z0-9]$'
    MinLength: '0'
    MaxLength: '63'
    Default: ''
  EnableVersioning:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - Enabled
      - Suspended
    Default: Enabled
  TransitionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
    Description: Days before transitioning logs to Glacier

Conditions:
  UseCustomBucketName: !Not [!Equals [!Ref BucketName, '']]
  VersioningEnabled: !Equals [!Ref EnableVersioning, Enabled]

Resources:
  FlowLogsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for ${AWS::StackName} VPC Flow Logs bucket encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable IAM User Permissions'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow VPC Flow Logs service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'

  VPCFlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !If [UseCustomBucketName, !Ref BucketName, !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc-flow-logs-${AWS::Region}']
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref FlowLogsKmsKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !If [VersioningEnabled, Enabled, Suspended]
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-current-transition'
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionDays
                StorageClass: GLACIER
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPCFlowLogs
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  VPCFlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref VPCFlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
              - s3:GetBucketAcl
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${VPCFlowLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
                's3:x-amz-acl': bucket-owner-full-control
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${VPCFlowLogsBucket}/*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${VPCFlowLogsBucket}'
            Condition:
              BoolIfExists:
                aws:SecureTransport: false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref VPCFlowLogsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt VPCFlowLogsBucket.Arn
  BucketPolicyStatus:
    Description: Status of the bucket policy enforcement
    Value: Bucket policy with strict access controls for VPC flow logs delivery is enforced.
  KmsKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of KMS key for bucket encryption
    Value: !GetAtt FlowLogsKmsKey.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "CloudFormation template for tag-driven Nginx auto-configuration on EC2 with SSM, S3 logging, and CloudWatch monitoring."

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

  MyIGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

  MyIGWAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref MyIGW

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref MyIGW

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  WebServerSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for web server allowing SSH, HTTP, HTTPS
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Security
