AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Production-ready VPC with one public and two private subnets across AZs, IGW, NAT Gateway, route tables, security groups, internal ALB with listener, private ECR repo with scanning, and SSM parameters storing key resource IDs.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-igw"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.101.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-app-subnet-1"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.102.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-app-subnet-2"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  NatEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-nat-eip"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEIP.AllocationId
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-nat-gw"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-rt"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PublicDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-rt"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  ALBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for internal ALB allowing HTTP/HTTPS inbound and outbound to app
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-alb-sg"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  AppSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for application allowing ALB HTTP, SSH, internal traffic
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-app-sg"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  DBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for DB allowing app PostgreSQL, internal traffic
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AppSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-db-sg"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ApplicationLoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-alb"
      Scheme: internal
      Type: application
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      LoadBalancerAttributes:
        - Key: routing.http.drop_invalid_header_fields.enabled
          Value: 'true'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-alb"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  Listener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref ApplicationLoadBalancer
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: redirect
          RedirectConfig:
            Protocol: 'HTTPS'
            Port: '443'
            StatusCode: 'HTTP_301'

  ECRRepository:
    Type: AWS::ECR::Repository
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-app-repo"
      ImageTagMutability: IMMUTABLE
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-app-ecr-repo"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  VPCParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/vpc/id"
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc-param"
        Environment: Production

  PublicSubnetParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/subnets/public"
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-param"
        Environment: Production

  PrivateSubnetsParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/subnets/private"
      Type: String
      Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PrivateSubnet1, !Ref PrivateSubnet2]]
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-subnets-param"
        Environment: Production

  ALBSGParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/security-groups/alb"
      Type: String
      Value: !GetAtt ALBSecurityGroup.GroupId
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-alb-sg-param"
        Environment: Production

  AppSGParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/security-groups/app"
      Type: String
      Value: !GetAtt AppSecurityGroup.GroupId
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-app-sg-param"
        Environment: Production

  DBSGParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/security-groups/db"
      Type: String
      Value: !GetAtt DBSecurityGroup.GroupId
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-db-sg-param"
        Environment: Production

  ALBParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/alb/arn"
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref ApplicationLoadBalancer
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-alb-arn-param"
        Environment: Production

  ListenerParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/alb/listener"
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref Listener
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-alb-listener-param"
        Environment: Production

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Serverless pipeline to collect, store, and analyze AWS Organization data for centralized governance and reporting.

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'orgdata-cfn-test-bucket'
    ConstraintDescription: "Override with globally unique name for production; test default may conflict"
    Description: Unique global name for the S3 bucket.
  ManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: '123456789012'
    ConstraintDescription: "Override with actual Organizations management account ID"
    Description: AWS Account ID of the Organizations management account.
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: managementcur
    Description: Name of the Athena/Glue database.
  TagsToInclude:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Comma-separated list of tag keys to include in reports (empty for all).
  OrganizationDataRoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: OrganizationDataAccessRole
    Description: Name of the cross-account IAM role in the management account.

Resources:
  OrgDataKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: CMK for OrgDataBucket encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable root account permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
              StringLike:
                'kms:EncryptionContext:aws:s3:arn': !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${BucketName}/*'

  OrgDataBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Ref BucketName
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref OrgDataKMSKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: OrgDataStorage

  OrgDataBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref OrgDataBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/*'
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: RestrictToAllowedPrincipals
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/org-data/*'
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}'
            Condition:
              StringNotLike:
                'aws:PrincipalArn':
                  - !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
                  - !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: LambdaExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:OrgDataCollector'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  LambdaExecutionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: LambdaOrgDataPolicy
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/org-data/*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ManagementAccountId}:role/${OrganizationDataRoleName}'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
            Resource: !GetAtt OrgDataKMSKey.Arn

  OrgDataCollector:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: OrgDataCollector
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: lambda_function.lambda_handler
      Timeout: 900
      MemorySize: 512
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os
          import datetime
          from botocore.exceptions import ClientError

          s3_client = boto3.client('s3')
          sts_client = boto3.client('sts')

          def get_tags(org_client, resource_type, resource_id, tags_to_include):
              tags = {}
              try:
                  response = org_client.list_tags_for_resource(ResourceId=resource_id, ResourceType=resource_type)
                  for tag in response.get('Tags', []):
                      key = tag['Key']
                      if not tags_to_include or key in tags_to_include:
                          tags[key] = tag['Value']
                  while 'NextToken' in response:
                      response = org_client.list_tags_for_resource(ResourceId=resource_id, ResourceType=resource_type, NextToken=response['NextToken'])
                      for tag in response.get('Tags', []):
                          key = tag['Key']
                          if not tags_to_include or key in tags_to_include:
                              tags[key] = tag['Value']
              except ClientError:
                  pass
              return tags

          def get_ous(org_client, parent_id, tags_to_include, level=0):
              ous = []
              paginator = org_client.get_paginator('list_organizational_units_for_parent')
              for page in paginator.paginate(ParentId=parent_id):
                  for ou in page.get('OrganizationalUnits', []):
                      ou_id = ou['Id']
                      ou['Tags'] = get_tags(org_client, 'ORGANIZATIONAL_UNIT', ou_id, tags_to_include)
                      ou['Children'] = get_ous(org_client, ou_id, tags_to_include, level + 1)
                      ou['Level'] = level
                      ous.append(ou)
              return ous

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              bucket = os.environ['S3_BUCKET']
              management_account_id = os.environ['MANAGEMENT_ACCOUNT_ID']
              organization_data_role_name = os.environ.get('ORGANIZATION_DATA_ROLE_NAME', 'OrganizationDataAccessRole')
              tags_str = os.environ.get('TAGS_TO_INCLUDE', '')
              tags_to_include = [t.strip() for t in tags_str.split(',') if t.strip()] if tags_str else []

              role_arn = f"arn:aws:iam::{management_account_id}:role/{organization_data_role_name}"

              try:
                  assumed_role = sts_client.assume_role(
                      RoleArn=role_arn,
                      RoleSessionName='OrgDataCollectorSession'
                  )
                  credentials = assumed_role['Credentials']

                  org_client = boto3.client(
                      'organizations',
                      aws_access_key_id=credentials['AccessKeyId'],
                      aws_secret_access_key=credentials['SecretAccessKey'],
                      aws_session_token=credentials['SessionToken']
                  )

                  # Get accounts
                  accounts = []
                  paginator = org_client.get_paginator('list_accounts')
                  for page in paginator.paginate():
                      for account in page.get('Accounts', []):
                          account_id = account['Id']
                          account['Tags'] = get_tags(org_client, 'ACCOUNT', account_id, tags_to_include)
                          accounts.append(account)

                  # Get root and OUs
                  roots_response = org_client.list_roots()
                  root_id = roots_response['Roots'][0]['Id']
                  root_tags = get_tags(org_client, 'ROOT', root_id, tags_to_include)
                  ous = get_ous(org_client, root_id, tags_to_include)

                  data = {
                      'org': {
                          'timestamp': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
                          'root': {'Id': root_id, 'Tags': root_tags},
                          'accounts': accounts,
                          'orgUnits': ous
                      }
                  }

                  key = f"org-data/{datetime.datetime.utcnow().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}.json"
                  s3_client.put_object(
                      Bucket=bucket,
                      Key=key,
                      Body=json.dumps(data, default=str),
                      ContentType='application/json'
                  )

              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"Error: {str(e)}")
                  raise e
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Environment:
        Variables:
          S3_BUCKET: !Ref OrgDataBucket
          MANAGEMENT_ACCOUNT_ID: !Ref ManagementAccountId
          TAGS_TO_INCLUDE: !Ref TagsToInclude
          ORGANIZATION_DATA_ROLE_NAME: !Ref OrganizationDataRoleName
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  WeeklyOrgDataSchedule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: WeeklyOrgDataSchedule
      ScheduleExpression: cron(0 2 ? * SUN *)
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Id: OrgDataCollectorTarget
          Arn: !GetAtt OrgDataCollector.Arn

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref OrgDataCollector
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: events.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !GetAtt WeeklyOrgDataSchedule.Arn

  GlueCrawlerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: GlueCrawlerRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole

  GlueCrawlerPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: GlueOrgDataPolicy
      Roles:
        - !Ref GlueCrawlerRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}'
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/org-data/*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
            Resource: !GetAtt OrgDataKMSKey.Arn
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - glue:CreateTable
              - glue:UpdateTable
              - glue:GetTable
              - glue:GetTables
              - glue:GetDatabase
              - glue:GetDatabases
              - glue:CreatePartition
              - glue:UpdatePartition
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:glue:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:database/${AthenaDatabaseName}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:glue:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${AthenaDatabaseName}/*'

  ManagementCurDatabase:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Database
    Properties:
      CatalogId: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      DatabaseInput:
        Name: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
        Description: Database for AWS Organizations data cataloged by Glue Crawler

  OrgDataCrawler:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Crawler
    Properties:
      Name: OrgDataCrawler
      Role: !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn
      DatabaseName: !Ref ManagementCurDatabase
      Description: Catalogs AWS Organizations data for Athena querying
      Targets:
        S3Targets:
          - Path: !Sub 's3://${OrgDataBucket}/org-data/'
      Schedule:
        ScheduleExpression: cron(0 4 ? * SUN *)
      RecrawlPolicy:
        RecrawlBehavior: CRAWL_NEW_FOLDERS_ONLY
      SchemaChangePolicy:
        UpdateBehavior: UPDATE_IN_DATABASE
        DeleteBehavior: LOG

Outputs:
  S3BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket for organization data
    Value: !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketArn'
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function collecting organization data
    Value: !GetAtt OrgDataCollector.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaFunctionArn'
  GlueCrawlerName:
    Description: Name of the Glue Crawler
    Value: !Ref OrgDataCrawler
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GlueCrawlerName'
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Description: Name of the Athena database
    Value: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AthenaDatabaseName'
  GlueCrawlerRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM role for Glue Crawler
    Value: !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GlueCrawlerRoleArn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys Amplify web app for TodoApp with production branch'

Parameters:
  RepoName:
    Type: String
    Default: TodoAppRepo
    Description: 'Name of the CodeCommit repository'
  AppName:
    Type: String
    Default: TodoApp
    Description: 'Name of the Amplify App'

Resources:
  TodoAppRepository:
    Type: AWS::CodeCommit::Repository
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: !Ref RepoName
      RepositoryDescription: 'Git repository hosting the TodoApp source code for Amplify deployment'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: TodoApp
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  AmplifyServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: amplify.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CodeCommitAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: codecommit:GitPull
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:codecommit:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${RepoName}'

  TodoAppAmplifyApp:
    Type: AWS::Amplify::App
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref AppName
      Platform: WEB
      Repository: !Ref RepoName
      IAMServiceRole: !GetAtt AmplifyServiceRole.Arn
      BuildSpec: |
        version: 1
        frontend:
          phases:
            preBuild:
              commands:
                - npm ci
            build:
              commands:
                - npm run build
          artifacts:
            baseDirectory: dist
          cache:
            paths:
              - node_modules/**/*

  TodoAppProductionBranch:
    Type: AWS::Amplify::Branch
    Properties:
      AppId: !Ref TodoAppAmplifyApp
      BranchName: production
      EnableAutoBuild: true
      Stage: PRODUCTION

Outputs:
  AmplifyAppId:
    Description: 'ID of the Amplify App'
    Value: !Ref TodoAppAmplifyApp
  ProductionBranchArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the production branch'
    Value: !Ref TodoAppProductionBranch
  DefaultDomain:
    Description: 'Default domain of the Amplify App'
    Value: !GetAtt TodoAppAmplifyApp.DefaultDomain
  ProductionBranchUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the production branch for accessing the hosted TodoApp'
    Value: !Sub 'https://production.${TodoAppAmplifyApp.DefaultDomain}'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure, multi-AZ VPC architecture with public/private subnets and NAT Gateway connectivity following AWS Well-Architected security best practices. Deploys VPC, IGW, NAT Gateways (HA), subnets, and route tables across two AZs.'

Parameters:
  VPCCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  PublicSubnetCIDRs:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24,10.0.2.0/24
    Description: Comma delimited list of CIDR blocks for public subnets
  PrivateSubnetCIDRs:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.3.0/24,10.0.4.0/24
    Description: Comma delimited list of CIDR blocks for private subnets
  AZs:
    Type: String
    Default: us-east-1a,us-east-1b
    Description: Availability Zones for subnets (two AZs)

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCCIDR
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam
        - Key: Compliance
          Value: WellArchitected

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam
        - Key: Compliance
          Value: WellArchitected

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  EIPA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EIPA'
        - Key: AZ
          Value: !Select [0, !Split [",", !Ref AZs]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam
        - Key: Compliance
          Value: WellArchitected

  EIPB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EIPB'
        - Key: AZ
          Value: !Select [1, !Split [",", !Ref AZs]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam
        - Key: Compliance
          Value: WellArchitected

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Select [0, !Split [",", !Ref PublicSubnetCIDRs]]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !Split [",", !Ref AZs]]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetA'
        - Key: AZ
          Value: !Select [0, !Split [",", !Ref AZs]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam
        - Key: Compliance
          Value: WellArchitected

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Select [1, !Split [",", !Ref PublicSubnetCIDRs]]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !Split [",", !Ref AZs]]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetB'
        - Key: AZ
          Value: !Select [1, !Split [",", !Ref AZs]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam
        - Key: Compliance
          Value: WellArchitected

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Select [0, !Split [",", !Ref PrivateSubnetCIDRs]]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !Split [",", !Ref AZs]]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetA'
        - Key: AZ
          Value: !Select [0, !Split [",", !Ref AZs]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam
        - Key: Compliance
          Value: WellArchitected

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Select [1, !Split [",", !Ref PrivateSubnetCIDRs]]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !Split [",", !Ref AZs]]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetB'
        - Key: AZ
          Value: !Select [1, !Split [",", !Ref AZs]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam
        - Key: Compliance
          Value: WellArchitected

  NATGatewayA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIPA.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NATGatewayA'
        - Key: AZ
          Value: !Select [0, !Split [",", !Ref AZs]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam
        - Key: Compliance
          Value: WellArchitected
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  NATGatewayB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIPB.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NATGatewayB'
        - Key: AZ
          Value: !Select [1, !Split [",", !Ref AZs]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam
        - Key: Compliance
          Value: WellArchitected
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam
        - Key: Compliance
          Value: WellArchitected

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociationA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociationB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTableA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRTA'
        - Key: AZ
          Value: !Select [0, !Split [",", !Ref AZs]]
        - Key: Environment

  PrivateRouteA:

        - Key: Environment

        - Key: Owner

  PrivateRouteB:

Outputs:

    Description: ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC

  PublicSubnetIds:

      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetIds'

  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Description: List of Private Subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PrivateSubnetA, !Ref PrivateSubnetB]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetIds'

  NatGatewayIds:
    Description: List of NAT Gateway IDs
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref NATGatewayA, !Ref NATGatewayB]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NatGatewayIds'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Standardized IAM Baseline for Secure Role-Based Access and Cross-Account Governance

Parameters:
  TrustedIdentityAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: '111111111111'
    Description: Account ID for Identity Management Account
  TrustedToolingAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: '222222222222'
    Description: Account ID for Tooling Management Account
  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Default: standardized-iam-external-id
    Description: External ID used for cross-account role assumptions
  PermissionsBoundaryArn:
    Type: String
    Default: 'arn:aws:iam::123456789012:policy/PermissionsBoundary'
    Description: ARN of the permissions boundary policy to apply to all roles
    AllowedPattern: '^arn:aws:iam::\d{12}:policy/[a-zA-Z0-9+/=,_.-]{1,128}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid IAM policy ARN

Resources:
  PrivilegedAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: PrivilegedAdminRole
      Path: "/"
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: "true"
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${TrustedIdentityAccountId}:root'
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${TrustedToolingAccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref ExternalId
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: "true"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AdministratorAccess
      PermissionsBoundary: !Ref PermissionsBoundaryArn
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EnforceMFAandExplicitDenySensitive
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: DenyWithoutMFA
                Effect: Deny
                Action: '*'
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  BoolIfExists:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: "false"
              - Sid: ExplicitDenySensitive
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - aws-portal:*
                  - ce:*
                  - cloudhsm:*
                  - organizations:*
                Resource: '*'

  RestrictedAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: RestrictedAdminRole
      Path: "/"
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: "true"
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${TrustedIdentityAccountId}:root'
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${TrustedToolingAccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref ExternalId
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: "true"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/PowerUserAccess
      PermissionsBoundary: !Ref PermissionsBoundaryArn
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EnforceMFAElevatedAndExplicitDenySensitive
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: DenyElevatedWithoutMFA
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - iam:*
                  - ec2:*
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  BoolIfExists:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: "false"
              - Sid: ExplicitDenySensitive
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - aws-portal:*
                  - ce:*
                  - cloudhsm:*
                  - support:*
                  - organizations:*
                Resource: '*'

  IdentityAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: IdentityAdminRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: iam.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${TrustedIdentityAccountId}:root'
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${TrustedToolingAccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref ExternalId
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: "true"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMFullAccess
      PermissionsBoundary: !Ref PermissionsBoundaryArn
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EnforceMFAElevatedExplicitDenyAccessKeysAndSensitive
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: DenyRolePolicyElevatedWithoutMFA
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - iam:CreateRole
                  - iam:DeleteRole
                  - iam:CreatePolicy
                  - iam:DeletePolicy
                  - iam:PutRolePolicy
                  - iam:DeleteRolePolicy
                  - iam:AttachRolePolicy
                  - iam:DetachRolePolicy
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  BoolIfExists:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: "false"
              - Sid: DenyAccessKeyOperations
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - iam:CreateAccessKey
                  - iam:UpdateAccessKey
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:user/*'
              - Sid: ExplicitDenySensitive
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - aws-portal:*
                  - ce:*
                  - cloudhsm:*
                  - organizations:*
                Resource: '*'

  CloudFormationExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: CloudFormationExecutionRole
      Path: "/service-roles/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudformation.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AWSCloudFormationFullAccess
      PermissionsBoundary: !Ref PermissionsBoundaryArn
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CloudFormationServicePermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject*
                  - s3:GetBucket*
                  - s3:List*
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'iam:PassedToService': cloudformation.amazonaws.com

  StackSetsExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: StackSetsExecutionRole
      Path: "/service-roles/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudformation.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${TrustedIdentityAccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref ExternalId
      PermissionsBoundary: !Ref PermissionsBoundaryArn
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StackSetsExecutionPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:*
                  - organizations:DescribeOrganization
                  - organizations:ListAccounts
                  - organizations:DescribeAccount
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject*
                  - s3:PutObject*
                  - s3:GetBucket*
                  - s3:ListBucket*
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'iam:PassedToService': cloudformation.amazonaws.com
              - Sid: DenyCrossRegion
                Effect: Deny
                Action: cloudformation:*
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringNotEquals:
                    aws:RequestedRegion: !Ref AWS::Region

  PrivilegedAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: PrivilegedAdminGroup
      Path: "/admins/"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AssumePrivilegedAdminRole
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sts:AssumeRole
                Resource: !GetAtt PrivilegedAdminRole.Arn
                Condition:
                  Bool:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: "true"

  RestrictedAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: RestrictedAdminGroup
      Path: "/admins/"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AssumeRestrictedAdminRole
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sts:AssumeRole
                Resource: !GetAtt RestrictedAdminRole.Arn
                Condition:
                  Bool:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: "true"

  IdentityAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: IdentityAdminGroup
      Path: "/admins/"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AssumeIdentityAdminRole
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sts:AssumeRole
                Resource: !GetAtt IdentityAdminRole.Arn
                Condition:
                  Bool:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: "true"

Outputs:
  PrivilegedAdminRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the PrivilegedAdminRole for integration into CI/CD and governance
    Value: !GetAtt PrivilegedAdminRole.Arn
  RestrictedAdminRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the RestrictedAdminRole
    Value: !GetAtt RestrictedAdminRole.Arn
  IdentityAdminRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IdentityAdminRole
    Value: !GetAtt IdentityAdminRole.Arn
  CloudFormationExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the CloudFormationExecutionRole
    Value: !GetAtt CloudFormationExecutionRole.Arn
  StackSetsExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the StackSetsExecutionRole for infrastructure-as-code workflows
    Value: !GetAtt StackSetsExecutionRole.Arn
  PrivilegedAdminGroupName:
    Description: Name of the PrivilegedAdminGroup
    Value: !Ref PrivilegedAdminGroup
  RestrictedAdminGroupName:
    Description: Name of the RestrictedAdminGroup
    Value: !Ref RestrictedAdminGroup
  IdentityAdminGroupName:
    Description: Name of the IdentityAdminGroup
    Value: !Ref IdentityAdminGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'VPC with Flow Logs delivered to secure S3 bucket for traffic monitoring'

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  BucketPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: vpc-flowlogs
  LogFilePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
  TrafficType:
    Type: String
    Default: ALL
    AllowedValues:
      - ALL
      - ACCEPT
      - REJECT
  LogFormat:
    Type: String
    Default: '${version} ${account-id} ${interface-id} ${srcaddr} ${dstaddr} ${srcport} ${dstport} ${protocol} ${packets} ${bytes} ${start} ${end} ${action} ${log-status} ${vpc-id} ${subnet-id} ${instance-id} ${pkt-src-aws-service} ${pkt-dst-aws-service} ${flow-direction} ${traffic-path} ${pkt-src-aws-vpc-id} ${pkt-dst-aws-vpc-id}'

Conditions:
  UseLogFilePrefix: !Not [!Equals [!Ref LogFilePrefix, '']]

Resources:
  FlowLogKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Enabled: true
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Description: 'KMS key for VPC Flow Logs S3 encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableRootAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'

  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketNamePrefix: !If
        - UseLogFilePrefix
        - !Sub '${BucketPrefix}-${LogFilePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-flowlogs'
        - !Sub '${BucketPrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-flowlogs'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref FlowLogKMSKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecuredTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${Bucket}/*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${Bucket}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowLogDeliveryPutObject
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': bucket-owner-full-control
          - Sid: AllowLogDeliveryGetBucketAcl
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:GetBucketAcl'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${Bucket}'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': bucket-owner-full-control

  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPCFlowLogs

  FlowLog:
    Type: AWS::EC2::FlowLog
    Properties:
      ResourceType: VPC
      ResourceId: !Ref VPC
      TrafficType: !Ref TrafficType
      LogFormat: !Ref LogFormat
      LogDestination: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${Bucket}'
      MaxAggregationInterval: 60
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FlowLog'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPCNetworkMonitoring

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Value: !Ref Bucket
    Description: 'S3 bucket name for VPC Flow Logs integration with downstream systems'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a lab environment to test EC2 instance scheduling automation. Provisions VPC with public subnet and internet access, five t3.nano managed instances tagged for dev environment, and a t3.micro admin instance preconfigured with AWS Instance Scheduler CLI via UserData. All instances use SSM for management with appropriate IAM roles.'

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for VPC
  PublicSubnetCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for public subnet

Mappings:
  AWSRegionToAMI:
    us-east-1:
      AmazonLinux2: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AmazonLinux2: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    us-west-1:
      AmazonLinux2: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    us-west-2:
      AmazonLinux2: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnetCidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT'

  DefaultPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  LabSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for lab instances allowing default all outbound for SSM and internet access. No inbound ports required (use SSM Session Manager).
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LabSG'

  SSMInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMInstanceRole'

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMInstanceRole

  AdminInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSchedulerPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStacks
                  - cloudformation:CreateStack
                  - cloudformation:UpdateStack
                  - cloudformation:DeleteStack
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AdminInstanceRole'

  AdminInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref AdminInstanceRole

  ManagedLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap [AWSRegionToAMI, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AmazonLinux2]
        InstanceType: t3.nano
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt SSMInstanceProfile.Arn
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
            Groups:
              - !Ref LabSG
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              Encrypted: true
              VolumeType: gp3
              DeleteOnTermination: true

  AdminLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap [AWSRegionToAMI, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AmazonLinux2]
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt AdminInstanceProfile.Arn
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
            Groups:
              - !Ref LabSG
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              Encrypted: true
              VolumeType: gp3
              DeleteOnTermination: true

  ManagedInstance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref ManagedLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt ManagedLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ManagedInstance1'
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

  ManagedInstance2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref ManagedLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt ManagedLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ManagedInstance2'
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

  ManagedInstance3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref ManagedLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt ManagedLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ManagedInstance3'
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

  ManagedInstance4:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref ManagedLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt ManagedLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ManagedInstance4'
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

  ManagedInstance5:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref ManagedLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt ManagedLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ManagedInstance5'
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

  AdminInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref AdminLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt AdminLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -ex
          yum update -y
          yum install -y aws-cfn-bootstrap python3-pip git awscli
          pip3 install --upgrade pip
          pip3 install boto3 pyyaml click tabulate jinja2
          git clone https://github.com/aws-solutions/instance-scheduler-on-aws.git /opt/instance-scheduler
          cd /opt/instance-scheduler/source/tools/cli
          python3 cli.py --help
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource AdminInstance --region ${AWS::Region}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AdminInstance'
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation
      - AdminInstanceRole

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID for the lab environment
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnetId:
    Description: Public Subnet ID

  LabSecurityGroupId:

  AdminInstanceId:
    Description: ID of AdminInstance with Instance Scheduler CLI (access via SSM Session Manager)

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template provisioning an S3 bucket with event-driven notifications to an SNS topic for s3:ObjectCreated:* events, including SNS topic policy restricted to the bucket.'

Resources:
  EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for S3 bucket and SNS topic encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowRootAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowS3Service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
          - Sid: AllowSNSService
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 'sns.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'

  ObjectCreatedNotificationsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: S3 Object Created Alerts
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref EncryptionKey

  ObjectCreatedNotificationsTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowS3ToPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref ObjectCreatedNotificationsTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-obj-notify-${AWS::StackName}'
      Topics:
        - !Ref ObjectCreatedNotificationsTopic

  ObjectNotificationsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-obj-notify-${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref EncryptionKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      NotificationConfiguration:
        TopicConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Topic: !Ref ObjectCreatedNotificationsTopic
    DependsOn: ObjectCreatedNotificationsTopicPolicy

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket configured for object creation notifications
    Value: !Ref ObjectNotificationsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt ObjectNotificationsBucket.Arn
  TopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic receiving S3 object creation notifications
    Value: !Ref ObjectCreatedNotificationsTopic
  EncryptionKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of KMS key used for encryption
    Value: !GetAtt EncryptionKey.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template provisioning a REST API Gateway integrated with an SQS queue for HTTP-based message retrieval via GET /messages endpoint.'

Resources:
  SqsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "CMK for MessageRetrievalQueue SSE"
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: "Enable root"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: "Allow SQS"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'

  MessageRetrievalQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: MessageRetrievalQueue
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsKmsKey

  ApiGatewaySqsExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: ApiGatewaySqsExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                AWS:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                AWS:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${MessageRetrievalApi}/*/*/*'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SqsReceiveMessagePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sqs:ReceiveMessage
                Resource: !GetAtt MessageRetrievalQueue.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: kms:Decrypt
                Resource: !GetAtt SqsKmsKey.Arn

  MessageRetrievalApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: MessageRetrievalApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  MessagesResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MessageRetrievalApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt MessageRetrievalApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: messages

  GetMessagesMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MessageRetrievalApi
      ResourceId: !Ref MessagesResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      RequestParameters:
        method.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages: true
        method.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds: true
        method.request.querystring.VisibilityTimeout: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:sqs:action/ReceiveMessage'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewaySqsExecutionRole.Arn
        RequestParameters:
          'integration.request.querystring.Action': 'ReceiveMessage'
          'integration.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages': 'method.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages'
          'integration.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds': 'method.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds'
          'integration.request.querystring.VisibilityTimeout': 'method.request.querystring.VisibilityTimeout'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        ContentHandling: CONVERT_TO_TEXT
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                #set($messages = $input.path('$.ReceiveMessageResponse.ReceiveMessageResult.Message'))
                #if( $util.isNullOrEmpty($messages) )
                  #set($messages = [] )
                #end
                $util.toJson( { "Messages" : $messages } )
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MessageRetrievalApi
      Description: !Sub 'Deployment for MessageRetrievalApi - ${AWS::StackName}'
    DependsOn: GetMessagesMethod

  ProdStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MessageRetrievalApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      StageName: Prod
      MethodSettings:
        - LoggingLevel: INFO
          MetricsEnabled: true
          DataTraceEnabled: false
          HttpMethod: '*'
          ResourcePath: '/*'

  MessageRetrievalQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MessageRetrievalQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:ReceiveMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt MessageRetrievalQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${MessageRetrievalApi}/*/*/*'

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: Full URL for the GET /messages endpoint
    Value: !Sub 'https://${MessageRetrievalApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${ProdStage}/messages'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ApiEndpoint'

  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS Queue
    Value: !Ref MessageRetrievalQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueUrl'

  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt MessageRetrievalQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueArn'

  ExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the API Gateway Execution Role for SQS
    Value: !GetAtt ApiGatewaySqsExecutionRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ExecutionRoleArn'

  KmsKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS Key for SQS SSE
    Value: !GetAtt SqsKmsKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KmsKeyArn'

    Type: CommaDelimitedList

    Description: Comma-separated list of callback URLs for OAuth
  LogoutURLs:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: "https://example.com/logout"

    Type: CommaDelimitedList

    Type: String
    Default: "true"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for event-driven integration between AWS EventBridge and a MongoDB API endpoint, routing application events to MongoDB for processing or logging, with API key authentication, IAM role, and SQS dead-letter queue for fault tolerance.'

Resources:
  CustomEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CustomEventBus'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeMongoDBIntegration

  MongoDBConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MongoDBConnection'
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: test_name
          ApiKeyValue: test_value

  EventBridgeDLQKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for EventBridge DLQ encryption
      Enabled: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SQS
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeMongoDBIntegration

  EventBridgeDeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref EventBridgeDLQKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeMongoDBIntegration

  MongoDBApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MongoDBApiDestination'
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt MongoDBConnection.Arn
      InvocationEndpoint: https://www.testanu.com
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10

  RouteToMongoDBRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !GetAtt CustomEventBus.Name
      Description: 'Route application events to MongoDB API destination'
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - prefix: app
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Id: MongoDBTarget
          ApiDestinationArn: !Ref MongoDBApiDestination
          DeadLetterConfig:
            Arn: !GetAtt EventBridgeDeadLetterQueue.Arn
          RetryPolicy:
            MaximumEventAgeInSeconds: 3600
            MaximumRetryAttempts: 3
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeMongoDBIntegration

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the custom EventBridge EventBus
    Value: !Ref CustomEventBus
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: ARN of the MongoDB API Destination
    Value: !Ref MongoDBApiDestination
  DeadLetterQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS Dead Letter Queue
    Value: !Ref EventBridgeDeadLetterQueue

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a private cross-account API Gateway with Lambda backend, custom domain, and VPC endpoint restrictions.'

Parameters:
  VpcEndpointId:
    Type: String
    Default: 'arn:aws:ec2:us-east-1:123456789012:vpce/vpce-0123456789abcdef0'
    Description: 'ARN of the VPC Endpoint for private access'
  CustomDomainName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'api.example.com'
    Description: 'Custom domain name for the private API'
  CertificateArn:
    Type: String
    Default: 'arn:aws:acm:us-east-1:123456789012:certificate/12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012'
    Description: 'ARN of ACM certificate for custom domain'
  StageName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'prod'
    Description: 'Stage name for the API'
  ApiName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'PrivateApi'
    Description: 'Name of the REST API'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaLoggingPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'

  PrivateLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: nodejs24.x
      Handler: index.handler
      Timeout: 30
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            return {
              statusCode: 200,
              body: JSON.stringify({ message: "Hello from private Lambda!" })
            };
          };

  ApiGatewayInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      FunctionName: !Ref PrivateLambda
      Principal: apigateway.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${PrivateRestApi}/*/*/*'

  PrivateRestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref ApiName
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - PRIVATE
        VpcEndpointIds:
          - !Ref VpcEndpointId

  ApiMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateRestApi
      ResourceId: !GetAtt PrivateRestApi.RootResourceId
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: AWS_PROXY
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/${PrivateLambda.Arn}/invocations'

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateRestApi
    DependsOn: ApiMethod

  ApiStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateRestApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      StageName: !Ref StageName

  PrivateCustomDomain:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::DomainName
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref CustomDomainName
      RegionalCertificateArn: !Ref CertificateArn
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - PRIVATE
      SecurityPolicy: TLS_1_2

  DomainMapping:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::BasePathMapping
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref PrivateCustomDomain
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateRestApi
      Stage: !Ref ApiStage

Outputs:
  RestApiId:
    Description: 'ID of the private REST API'
    Value: !Ref PrivateRestApi
  DomainName:
    Description: 'Custom Domain Name of the private API'
    Value: !Ref PrivateCustomDomain
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function'
    Value: !GetAtt PrivateLambda.Arn
  InvokeUrl:
    Description: 'Invoke URL for the private API with custom domain'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${CustomDomainName}/${StageName}/'
