final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Centralized SNS Alerting System with Fallback Redundancy"

Parameters:
  CentralTopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: "CentralAlertingTopic"
    Description: "Name for the primary centralized alerting SNS topic"
  FallbackTopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: "FallbackAlertingTopic"
    Description: "Name for the fallback SNS topic"
  EmailEndpoint:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: "Optional email endpoint for primary topic subscription (leave empty if not needed)"
  HttpEndpoint:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: "Optional HTTP endpoint URL for primary topic subscription (leave empty if not needed)"
  HttpsEndpoint:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: "Optional HTTPS endpoint URL for primary topic subscription (leave empty if not needed)"
  FallbackEmail:
    Type: String
    MinLength: 1
    Description: "Required fallback email address for redundancy"

Conditions:
  EmailSubscriptionCondition: !Not [!Equals [!Ref EmailEndpoint, ""]]
  HttpSubscriptionCondition: !Not [!Equals [!Ref HttpEndpoint, ""]]
  HttpsSubscriptionCondition: !Not [!Equals [!Ref HttpsEndpoint, ""]]

Resources:
  AlertingKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "KMS key for centralized alerting SNS topics"
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "sns.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - "kms:GenerateDataKey*"
              - "kms:Decrypt"
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                "kms:EncryptionContext:aws:sns:topic-arn":
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${CentralTopicName}"
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${FallbackTopicName}"
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CentralizedAlerting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  CentralTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref CentralTopicName
      DisplayName: "Centralized Alerts"
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref AlertingKmsKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CentralizedAlerting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  CentralTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref CentralTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchAlarms
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${CentralTopicName}"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"
          - Sid: AllowRDSNotifications
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: rds.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${CentralTopicName}"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"
          - Sid: AllowS3Notifications
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${CentralTopicName}"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"
          - Sid: AllowBudgetsAlerts
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: budgets.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${CentralTopicName}"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"

  EmailSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: EmailSubscriptionCondition
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref CentralTopic
      Protocol: email
      Endpoint: !Ref EmailEndpoint

  HttpSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: HttpSubscriptionCondition
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref CentralTopic
      Protocol: http
      Endpoint: !Ref HttpEndpoint
      DeliveryPolicy: |
        {
          "http": {
            "timeout": 30,
            "defaultHealthyRetryPolicy": {
              "numRetries": 3,
              "numNoDataRetries": 3,
              "numMinDelayRetries": 0,
              "numMaxDelayRetries": 0
            }
          }
        }

  HttpsSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: HttpsSubscriptionCondition
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref CentralTopic
      Protocol: https
      Endpoint: !Ref HttpsEndpoint
      DeliveryPolicy: |
        {
          "https": {
            "timeout": 30,
            "defaultHealthyRetryPolicy": {
              "numRetries": 3,
              "numNoDataRetries": 3,
              "numMinDelayRetries": 0,
              "numMaxDelayRetries": 0
            },
            "hostHealthCheck": {
              "hostHealthCheckWindow": 300,
              "hostHealthCheckHealthyThreshold": 2,
              "hostHealthCheckUnhealthyThreshold": 2,
              "hostHealthCheckInterval": 30
            }
          }
        }

  FallbackTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref FallbackTopicName
      DisplayName: "Fallback Alerts"
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref AlertingKmsKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CentralizedAlerting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  FallbackEmailSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref FallbackTopic
      Protocol: email
      Endpoint: !Ref FallbackEmail

  FallbackTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref FallbackTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchFallback
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${FallbackTopicName}"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"

  SNSFailedNotificationsAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: SNSFailedNotificationsAlarm
      AlarmDescription: "Alarms when there are failed notifications on the central SNS topic, triggering fallback"
      ActionsEnabled: true
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref FallbackTopic
      Dimensions:
        - Name: TopicName
          Value: !Ref CentralTopicName
      MetricName: NumberOfNotificationsFailed
      Namespace: AWS/SNS
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 1
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CentralizedAlerting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  PrimaryTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the primary centralized alerting SNS topic
    Value: !Ref CentralTopic
  FallbackTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the fallback SNS topic
    Value: !Ref FallbackTopic
  AlarmArn:
    Description: ARN of the CloudWatch Alarm monitoring failed notifications
    Value: !Ref SNSFailedNotificationsAlarm
  EmailSubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the email subscription (empty if not created)
    Value: !If [EmailSubscriptionCondition, !Ref EmailSubscription, ""]
  HttpSubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the HTTP subscription (empty if not created)
    Value: !If [HttpSubscriptionCondition, !Ref HttpSubscription, ""]
  HttpsSubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the HTTPS subscription (empty if not created)
    Value: !If [HttpsSubscriptionCondition, !Ref HttpsSubscription, ""]
  FallbackEmailSubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the fallback email subscription
    Value: !Ref FallbackEmailSubscription
  AlertingKmsKeyId:
    Description: ID of the KMS key used for SNS encryption
    Value: !Ref AlertingKmsKey

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for AWS Batch environment with VPC, S3 bucket, and sample S3 processing job definition.

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: batchdemo
    Description: Unique prefix for S3 bucket name
    MinLength: 3
    MaxLength: 20
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9]([a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9])?$'
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for VPC
    AllowedPattern: '^(?:(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)\.){3}(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)(?:\/(?:[0-9]|[1-2][0-9]|3[0-2]))$'
  SubnetCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for public subnet
    AllowedPattern: '^(?:(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)\.){3}(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)(?:\/(?:[0-9]|[1-2][0-9]|3[0-2]))$'
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: m5.large
    Description: EC2 instance type for Batch compute environment
  ImageUri:
    Type: String
    Default: amazonlinux:2
    Description: Docker image URI for job definition
  JobVcpus:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 1024
    Description: vCPUs for the job
  JobMemory:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2000
    MinValue: 512
    MaxValue: 102400
    Description: Memory (MiB) for the job
  MinvCpus:
    Type: Number
    Default: 0
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 102400
    Description: Minimum vCPUs for compute environment
  DesiredvCpus:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 102400
    Description: Desired vCPUs for compute environment
  MaxvCpus:
    Type: Number
    Default: 16
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 102400
    Description: Maximum vCPUs for compute environment

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-IGW"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref SubnetCidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  BatchComputeSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for AWS Batch compute instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BatchComputeSG"

  S3KmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for ${BucketName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName} SSE-KMS'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
              ArnEquals:
                'kms:EncryptionContext:aws:s3:arn': !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${BucketName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}'

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${BucketName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3KmsKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-S3Bucket"

  BatchServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: batch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSBatchServiceRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BatchServiceRole"

  BatchInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonEC2ContainerServiceforEC2Role
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BatchInstancePermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - batch:DescribeJobQueues
                  - batch:SubmitJob
                  - ecs:DescribeClusters
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BatchInstanceRole"

  BatchInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref BatchInstanceRole

  BatchJobRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchLogsFullAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3Access
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey
                Resource: !GetAtt S3KmsKey.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/batch/*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BatchJobRole"

  BatchComputeEnv:
    Type: AWS::Batch::ComputeEnvironment
    Properties:
      Type: MANAGED
      ComputeResources:
        Type: EC2
        MinvCpus: !Ref MinvCpus
        MaxvCpus: !Ref MaxvCpus
        DesiredvCpus: !Ref DesiredvCpus
        InstanceTypes:
          - !Ref InstanceType
        Subnets:
          - !Ref PublicSubnet
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref BatchComputeSG
        InstanceRole: !GetAtt BatchInstanceProfile.Arn
      ServiceRole: !GetAtt BatchServiceRole.Arn
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BatchComputeEnv"

  BatchJobQueue:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobQueue
    Properties:
      Priority: 1
      ComputeEnvironmentOrder:
        - Order: 1
          ComputeEnvironment: !Ref BatchComputeEnv
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BatchJobQueue"

  BatchJobDef:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobDefinition
    Properties:
      Type: container
      RetryStrategy:
        Attempts: 3
      Timeout:
        AttemptDurationSeconds: 1800
      ContainerProperties:
        Image: !Ref ImageUri
        Vcpus: !Ref JobVcpus
        Memory: !Ref JobMemory
        JobRoleArn: !GetAtt BatchJobRole.Arn
        Command:
          - /bin/sh
          - -c
          - !Sub |
              yum update -y && yum install -y aws-cli && aws s3 cp s3://${S3Bucket}/input.txt /tmp/output.txt && aws s3 cp /tmp/output.txt s3://${S3Bucket}/output.txt
        LogConfiguration:
          LogDriver: awslogs
          Options:
            awslogs-group: /aws/batch/job
            awslogs-region: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
            awslogs-stream-prefix: batch
        MountPoints: []
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BatchJobDef"

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for input/output
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  JobQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the AWS Batch job queue
    Value: !Ref BatchJobQueue
  JobDefinitionArn:
    Description: ARN of the AWS Batch job definition
    Value: !Ref BatchJobDef
  ComputeEnvironmentArn:
    Description: ARN of the AWS Batch compute environment
    Value: !Ref BatchComputeEnv
  VPCId:
    Description: ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Self-contained web server environment in AWS with VPC, public subnet, security group, EC2 t2.micro instance running Apache/PHP, and content deployed from S3 ZIP file.'

Parameters:
  VPCCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for VPC
  SubnetCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for public subnet
  S3BucketName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket containing the webcontent.zip file
  S3KeyName:
    Type: String
    Description: S3 object key (path) for the webcontent.zip file
  InstanceKeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional EC2 KeyPair name for SSH access (if provided, SSH port 22 will be opened from 0.0.0.0/0)

Conditions:
  UseKeyPair:
    Fn::Not:
      - Fn::Equals:
          - !Ref InstanceKeyName
          - ''

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCCidrBlock
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 0
          - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: !Ref SubnetCidrBlock
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PublicInternetRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  WebServerSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for web server allowing HTTP and optional SSH
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - !If
          - UseKeyPair
          - IpProtocol: tcp
            FromPort: 22
            ToPort: 22
            CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebServerSG'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  WebServerInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      KeyName:
        Fn::If:
          - UseKeyPair
          - !Ref InstanceKeyName
          - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeType: gp2
            VolumeSize: 8
            Encrypted: true
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
        HttpEndpoint: disabled
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: '0'
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref WebServerSecurityGroup
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          yum install -y httpd php unzip wget aws-cfn-bootstrap
          systemctl start httpd
          systemctl enable httpd
          wget "https://${S3BucketName}.s3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${S3KeyName}" -O /tmp/webcontent.zip
          unzip -o /tmp/webcontent.zip -d /var/www/html/
          chown -R apache:apache /var/www/html
          chmod -R 755 /var/www/html
          rm -f /tmp/webcontent.zip
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource WebServerInstance --region ${AWS::Region}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebServer'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT10M
    DependsOn:
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

Outputs:
  EC2InstancePublicIp:
    Description: Public IP address of the web server instance
    Value: !GetAtt WebServerInstance.PublicIp
  EC2InstancePublicDns:
    Description: Public DNS name of the web server instance
    Value: !GetAtt WebServerInstance.PublicDnsName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Basic Lambda function with Node.js inline code and CloudWatch Logs execution role"

Resources:
  LambdaBasicExecutionRole:
    Type: "AWS::IAM::Role"
    Properties:
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              Service: "lambda.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - "arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole"

  BasicLambdaFunction:
    Type: "AWS::Lambda::Function"
    Properties:
      Runtime: "nodejs20.x"
      Handler: "index.handler"
      Timeout: 3
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaBasicExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
              console.log('Received event:', JSON.stringify(event, null, 2));
              return event.returnValue || { statusCode: 200, body: 'Hello from Lambda!' };
          };
      MemorySize: 128

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: "ARN of the Lambda Function"
    Value: !GetAtt BasicLambdaFunction.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaFunctionArn"

  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: "Name of the Lambda Function"
    Value: !Ref BasicLambdaFunction
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaFunctionName"
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-e1f4ad24' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-e1f4ad24: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaBasicExecutionRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaBasicExecutionRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'BasicLambdaFunction: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'BasicLambdaFunction: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-e1f4ad24: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFront distribution fronting a regional API Gateway REST API with /hello GET endpoint returning static JSON response. No caching enabled, HTTPS origin and viewer redirect.'

Resources:
  ApiGatewayRestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: HelloWorldApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  HelloResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt ApiGatewayRestApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: hello

  HelloGetMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref HelloResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseModels:
            application/json: 'Empty'
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{"statusCode": 200, "body": "{\"message\": \"Hello World\"}", "headers": {"Content-Type": ["application/json"]}}'

  ApiGatewayDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi
      Description: Production Deployment
    DependsOn:
      - HelloGetMethod

  ProdStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiGatewayDeployment
      StageName: prod
      CacheClusterSize: '0.5'
      TracingEnabled: true

  ApiWebACL:
    Type: AWS::WAFv2::WebACL
    Properties:
      Name: ApiWebACL
      DefaultAction:
        Allow: {}
      Scope: CLOUDFRONT
      VisibilityConfig:
        SampledRequestsEnabled: false
        CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: false
        MetricName: ApiWebACL

  CloudFrontDistribution:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Enabled: true
        PriceClass: PriceClass_100
        WebACLId: !GetAtt ApiWebACL.Arn
        ViewerCertificate:
          CloudFrontDefaultCertificate: true
          MinimumProtocolVersion: TLSv1.2_2021
        Origins:
          - Id: ApiGatewayOrigin
            DomainName: !Sub '${ApiGatewayRestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod'
            CustomOriginConfig:
              HTTPSPort: 443
              HTTPPort: 80
              OriginProtocolPolicy: https-only
              OriginSSLProtocols:
                - TLSv1.2
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: ApiGatewayOrigin
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
          AllowedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
            - OPTIONS
            - PUT
            - POST
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
          CachedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
          Compress: true
          ForwardedValues:
            QueryString: true
            Cookies:
              Forward: none
          MinTTL: 0
          DefaultTTL: 0
          MaxTTL: 0

Outputs:
  CloudFrontDomainName:
    Description: Domain name of the CloudFront distribution
    Value: !GetAtt CloudFrontDistribution.DomainName

  ApiEndpointUrl:
    Description: Full URL to the API /hello endpoint
    Value: !Sub 'https://${ApiGatewayRestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/hello'

  ProdStageArn:
    Description: ARN of the prod stage
    Value: !Ref ProdStage
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-ab42a860' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-ab42a860: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ApiGatewayRestApi: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ApiGatewayRestApi: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'HelloResource: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'HelloResource: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'HelloGetMethod: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'HelloGetMethod: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'ApiGatewayDeployment: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ApiGatewayDeployment: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'ApiWebACL: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ApiWebACL: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'CloudFrontDistribution: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CloudFrontDistribution: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'ProdStage: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ProdStage: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-ab42a860: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role with configurable permission boundaries enforcing governance controls for developer-created IAM resources. Supports toggle for strict enforcement requiring naming prefixes, Owner tags, and default permission boundary.'
Parameters:
  EnforceStrictBoundaries:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ["Yes", "No"]
    Default: "Yes"
    Description: 'Toggle to enable (Yes) strict governance (prefix, Owner tag, boundary required) or permissive (No) IAM access.'
  TeamPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: "MyTeam"
    Description: 'Naming prefix (e.g., MyTeam*) for developer-managed IAM resources.'
  OwnerTagValue:
    Type: String
    Default: "MyTeam"
    Description: 'Mandatory value for the Owner tag on all developer-managed IAM resources.'
  AssumerPrincipalArn:
    Type: String
    Default: "arn:aws:iam::111111111111:user/developer-placeholder"
    Description: 'ARN of the AWS principal (user/role) trusted to assume the DeveloperRole.'
Conditions:
  StrictMode: !Equals [!Ref EnforceStrictBoundaries, "Yes"]
Resources:
  DefaultPermissionBoundary:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${TeamPrefix}DefaultBoundary'
      Description: 'Default permission boundary restricting roles to S3 full access and IAM read-only operations.'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: s3:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:GetAccountSummary
              - iam:GetPolicy
              - iam:GetRole
              - iam:ListPolicies
              - iam:ListRoles
              - iam:SimulatePrincipalPolicy
              - iam:SimulateCustomPolicy
            Resource: '*'
  DeveloperRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${TeamPrefix}DeveloperRole'
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref AssumerPrincipalArn
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      PermissionsBoundary: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${DefaultPermissionBoundary}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref OwnerTagValue
        - Key: Team
          Value: !Ref TeamPrefix
      Policies:
        - !If
          - StrictMode
          - PolicyName: StrictIAMGovernance
            PolicyDocument:
              Version: '2012-10-17'
              Statement:
                - Effect: Allow
                  Action:
                    - iam:GetPolicy
                    - iam:GetPolicyVersion
                  Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${DefaultPermissionBoundary}'
                - Effect: Allow
                  Action:
                    - iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole
                    - iam:PutRolePermissionsBoundary
                  Resource: '*'
                  Condition:
                    StringEquals:
                      iam:PermissionsBoundary: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${DefaultPermissionBoundary}'
                - Effect: Allow
                  Action: iam:CreatePolicy
                  Resource: '*'
                  Condition:
                    StringLike:
                      iam:PolicyName: !Sub '${TeamPrefix}*'
                    ForAllValues:StringEquals:
                      iam:RequestTag/Owner: !Ref OwnerTagValue
                - Effect: Allow
                  Action:
                    - iam:CreateRole
                    - iam:UpdateRole
                    - iam:AttachRolePolicy
                    - iam:PutRolePermissionsBoundary
                    - iam:TagRole
                    - iam:PassRole
                  Resource: '*'
                  Condition:
                    StringLike:
                      iam:RoleName: !Sub '${TeamPrefix}*'
                    ForAllValues:StringEquals:
                      iam:RequestTag/Owner: !Ref OwnerTagValue
                    StringEquals:
                      iam:PermissionsBoundary: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${DefaultPermissionBoundary}'
                - Effect: Deny
                  Action: iam:UntagRole
                  Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/${TeamPrefix}*'
                  Condition:
                    ForAnyValue:StringEquals:
                      iam:TagKeys: Owner
                - Effect: Allow
                  Action:
                    - iam:GetRolePolicy
                    - iam:ListAttachedRolePolicies
                    - iam:DetachRolePolicy
                    - iam:DeleteRolePolicy
                  Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/${TeamPrefix}*'
          - PolicyName: PermissiveIAMAccess
            PolicyDocument:
              Version: '2012-10-17'
              Statement:
                - Effect: Allow
                  Action:
                    - iam:GetPolicy
                    - iam:GetPolicyVersion
                  Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${DefaultPermissionBoundary}'
                - Effect: Allow
                  Action: iam:*
                  Resource: '*'
Outputs:
  DeveloperRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DeveloperRole for assuming and using governed IAM operations.'
    Value: !GetAtt DeveloperRole.Arn
  DefaultPermissionBoundaryArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the default permission boundary policy to enforce on created roles.'
    Value: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${DefaultPermissionBoundary}'
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-c7e1b29b' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-c7e1b29b: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DefaultPermissionBoundary: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DefaultPermissionBoundary: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'DeveloperRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DeveloperRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-c7e1b29b: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

Description: 'AppSync GraphQL API with Lambda backend for Pet Inventory'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  PetInventoryLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PetInventoryLambda'
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Timeout: 10
      MemorySize: 128
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            return [
              {"id": "1", "name": "Fido", "type": "Dog"},
              {"id": "2", "name": "Whiskers", "type": "Cat"},
              {"id": "3", "name": "Spot", "type": "Dog"},
              {"id": "4", "name": "Fluffy", "type": "Cat"}
            ];
          };

  PetShopAPI:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::GraphQLApi
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PetShopAPI'
      AuthenticationType: API_KEY

  PetSchema:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::GraphQLSchema
    Properties:
      ApiId: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.ApiId
      Definition: |
        type Pet {
          id: ID!
          name: String!
          type: String!
        }

        type Query {
          getPets: [Pet!]!
        }

        schema {
          query: Query
        }

  AppSyncInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !GetAtt PetInventoryLambda.Arn
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: appsync.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.Arn

  PetLambdaDataSource:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::DataSource
    Properties:
      ApiId: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.ApiId
      Name: PetLambdaDS
      Type: AWS_LAMBDA
      LambdaConfig:
        LambdaFunctionArn: !GetAtt PetInventoryLambda.Arn

  GetPetsResolver:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::Resolver
    Properties:
      ApiId: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.ApiId
      TypeName: Query
      FieldName: getPets
      DataSourceName: !GetAtt PetLambdaDataSource.Name
      RequestMappingTemplate: |
        {
          "version": "2018-05-29",
          "payload": {}
        }
      ResponseMappingTemplate: |
        #if( $ctx.error )
          $util.error($ctx.error.message, $ctx.error.type)
        #end
        $util.toJson($ctx.result)

  PetShopAPIKey:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::ApiKey
    Properties:
      ApiId: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.ApiId
      Expires: 365

Outputs:
  GraphQLURL:
    Description: 'GraphQL API endpoint'
    Value: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.GraphQLUrl
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GraphQLURL'

  ApiKey:
    Description: 'AppSync API Key'
    Value: !GetAtt PetShopAPIKey.ApiKey
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ApiKey'

  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'Pet Inventory Lambda Function ARN'
    Value: !GetAtt PetInventoryLambda.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: Serverless Calculator Workflow using AWS Step Functions and Lambda

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  CalculatorLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: "/aws/lambda/Calculator"
      RetentionInDays: 3

  Calculator:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: Calculator
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def handler(event, context):
              operator = event["operator"]
              operands = event["operands"]
              if not isinstance(operands, list) or len(operands) != 2:
                  raise Exception("Invalid operands")
              try:
                  a = float(operands[0])
                  b = float(operands[1])
              except (ValueError, TypeError):
                  raise Exception("Operands must be numbers")
              if operator == "add":
                  result = a + b
              elif operator == "subtract":
                  result = a - b
              elif operator == "multiply":
                  result = a * b
              elif operator == "divide":
                  if b == 0:
                      raise Exception("Division by zero")
                  result = a / b
              else:
                  raise Exception("Unsupported operator")
              return {"result": result}
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128

  StepFunctionsExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: states.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: InvokeCalculatorPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt Calculator.Arn

  CalculatorStateMachine:
    Type: AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine
    Properties:
      StateMachineName: Calculator-StateMachine
      StateMachineType: STANDARD
      RoleArn: !GetAtt StepFunctionsExecutionRole.Arn
      DefinitionString: !Sub |
        {
          "Comment": "A simple calculator workflow",
          "StartAt": "ChoiceState",
          "States": {
            "ChoiceState": {
              "Type": "Choice",
              "Choices": [
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "add",
                  "Next": "Calculate"
                },
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "subtract",
                  "Next": "Calculate"
                },
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "multiply",
                  "Next": "Calculate"
                },
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "divide",
                  "Next": "Calculate"
                }
              ],
              "Default": "FailState"
            },
            "Calculate": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "${Calculator.Arn}",
              "Parameters": {
                "operator.$": "$.operator",
                "operands.$": "$.operands"
              },
              "Next": "SuccessState"
            },
            "SuccessState": {
              "Type": "Succeed"
            },
            "FailState": {
              "Type": "Fail",
              "Cause": "Unsupported operator",
              "Error": "InvalidInput"
            }
          }
        }

Outputs:
  StateMachineArn:
    Description: ARN of the Calculator State Machine
    Value: !Ref CalculatorStateMachine
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: Name of the Calculator Lambda Function
    Value: !Ref Calculator

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Automated image recognition pipeline using Step Functions, S3, Rekognition, and SNS for human face detection with SMS alerts.'

Resources:
  LogGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::Logs::LogGroup'
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/states/${AWS::StackName}-statemachine'
      RetentionInDays: 14

  S3EncryptionKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for S3 bucket encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: '0'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: '1'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'

  SNSEncryptionKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for SNS topic encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: '0'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: '1'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sns.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'

  ImageBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Delete
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-images-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - BucketKeyEnabled: true
            ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3EncryptionKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      NotificationConfiguration:
        EventBridgeConfiguration:
          EventBridgeEnabled: true

  AlertTopic:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Topic'
    Properties:
      DisplayName: HumanDetectionAlerts
      FifoTopic: false
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SNSEncryptionKey

  SmsSubscription:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Subscription'
    Properties:
      Protocol: sms
      TopicArn: !Ref AlertTopic
      Endpoint: '+14071113333'

  StepFunctionsExecutionRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: states.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StepFunctionsExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - rekognition:DetectLabels
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref AlertTopic
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBucket}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Decrypt
                Resource: !Ref S3EncryptionKey
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                Resource: !Ref SNSEncryptionKey
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub '${LogGroup.Arn}:*'

  EventBridgeStepFunctionsRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EventBridgeStepFunctionsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - states:StartExecution
                Resource: !Ref StateMachine

  EmptyBucketLambdaRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3EmptyBucketPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:ListBucketVersions
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBucket}'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                  - s3:DeleteObjectVersion
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBucket}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Decrypt
                Resource: !Ref S3EncryptionKey

  StateMachine:
    Type: 'AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleArn: !GetAtt StepFunctionsExecutionRole.Arn
      DefinitionString: !Sub |
        {
          "Comment": "Image recognition pipeline for human detection",
          "StartAt": "ValidateExtension",
          "States": {
            "ValidateExtension": {
              "Type": "Choice",
              "Choices": [
                {
                  "Variable": "$.detail.object.key",
                  "StringMatches": "(?i)^.*\\.(jpg|jpeg|png|gif)$",
                  "Next": "DetectLabels"
                }
              ],
              "Default": "ValidationFailed"
            },
            "ValidationFailed": {
              "Type": "Fail",
              "Cause": "File extension not supported. Only jpg, jpeg, png, gif allowed."
            },
            "DetectLabels": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "arn:aws:states:::aws-sdk:rekognition:detectLabels.sync",
              "Parameters": {
                "Image": {
                  "S3Object": {
                    "Bucket.$": "$.detail.bucket.name",
                    "Name.$": "$.detail.object.key"
                  }
                },
                "MaxLabels": 10,
                "MinConfidence": 80.0
              },
              "ResultPath": "$.rekognition",
              "Next": "CheckForHuman"
            },
            "CheckForHuman": {
              "Type": "Choice",
              "Choices": [
                {
                  "Variable": "$.rekognition.Labels[?(@.Confidence > 80)].Name",
                  "ArrayContains": "Person",
                  "Next": "SendAlert"
                },
                {
                  "Variable": "$.rekognition.Labels[?(@.Confidence > 80)].Name",
                  "ArrayContains": "Human",
                  "Next": "SendAlert"
                }
              ],
              "Default": "NoHumanDetected"
            },
            "NoHumanDetected": {
              "Type": "Succeed"
            },
            "SendAlert": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "arn:aws:states:::sns:publish.sync",
              "Parameters": {
                "TopicArn": "${AlertTopic}",
                "Subject": "Human Detected in Image",
                "Message": "Human face detected in s3://$.detail.bucket.name/$.detail.object.key"
              },
              "End": true
            }
          }
        }
      LoggingConfiguration:
        Level: ALL
        IncludeExecutionData: true
        Destinations:
          - CloudWatchLogsLogGroup:
              LogGroupArn: !GetAtt LogGroup.Arn

  ImageUploadRule:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::Rule'
    Properties:
      Description: 'Trigger Step Functions on image uploads to S3 bucket'
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.s3
        'detail-type':
          - 'Object Created'
        detail:
          bucket:
            name:
              - !Ref ImageBucket
          object:
            key:
              - prefix: uploads/
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Arn: !Ref StateMachine
          Id: StepFunctionsTarget
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeStepFunctionsRole.Arn

  EmptyBucketLambda:
    Type: 'AWS::Lambda::Function'
    Properties:
      Handler: index.empty_bucket
      Role: !GetAtt EmptyBucketLambdaRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 300
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import boto3
          import cfnresponse
          import urllib.parse

          def empty_bucket(event, context):
              try:
                  request_type = event['RequestType']
                  bucket_name = event['ResourceProperties']['Bucket']
                  s3_client = boto3.client('s3')

                  if request_type in ['Create', 'Update']:
                      cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.SUCCESS, {})
                      return

                  if request_type == 'Delete':
                      # Empty all versions and delete markers
                      versions_to_delete = []
                      delete_markers_to_delete = []

                      paginator = s3_client.get_paginator('list_object_versions')
                      for page in paginator.paginate(Bucket=bucket_name):
                          if 'Versions' in page:
                              versions_to_delete.extend([
                                  {
                                      'Key': version['Key'],
                                      'VersionId': version['VersionId']
                                  }
                                  for version in page['Versions']
                              ])
                          if 'DeleteMarkers' in page:
                              delete_markers_to_delete.extend([
                                  {
                                      'Key': delete_marker['Key'],
                                      'VersionId': delete_marker['VersionId']
                                  }
                                  for delete_marker in page['DeleteMarkers']
                              ])

                      # Delete

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to deploy Auto Scaling Groups with Linux and Windows EC2 instances managed by AWS Systems Manager (SSM), using dynamic AMIs from SSM Parameter Store, in a VPC with public subnets.'

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    Description: EC2 instance type for the launch templates
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
  MinSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10
    Description: Minimum number of instances in each Auto Scaling Group
  MaxSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 20
    Description: Maximum number of instances in each Auto Scaling Group
  DesiredCapacity:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10
    Description: Desired number of instances in each Auto Scaling Group
  SSHAccessCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for SSH admin access to instances

Resources:
  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: SSMRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMRole'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  DefaultPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for SSM-managed EC2 instances allowing HTTP, SSH, and outbound SSM communication
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHAccessCidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSG'

  LinuxLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName:
        Fn::Join:
          - "-"
          - - !Ref AWS::StackName
            - "LinuxLaunchTemplate"
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1}}'
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref InstanceProfile
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        Monitoring:
          Enabled: false
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        UserData: !Base64 |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y -q
          yum install -y amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl status amazon-ssm-agent

  WindowsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName:
        Fn::Join:
          - "-"
          - - !Ref AWS::StackName
            - "WindowsLaunchTemplate"
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2019-English-Full-Base:1}}'
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref InstanceProfile
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        Monitoring:
          Enabled: false
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        UserData: !Base64 |
          <powershell>
          Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Force
          Restart-Service AmazonSSMAgent -Force
          </powershell>

  LinuxAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName:
        Fn::Join:
          - "-"
          - - !Ref AWS::StackName
            - "LinuxASG"
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LinuxLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LinuxLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: !Ref MinSize
      MaxSize: !Ref MaxSize
      DesiredCapacity: !Ref DesiredCapacity
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            Fn::Join:
              - "-"
              - - !Ref AWS::StackName
                - "LinuxASG"
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation
      - PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation

  WindowsAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName:
        Fn::Join:
          - "-"
          - - !Ref AWS::StackName
            - "WindowsASG"
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref WindowsLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt WindowsLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: !Ref MinSize
      MaxSize: !Ref MaxSize
      DesiredCapacity: !Ref DesiredCapacity
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            Fn::Join:
              - "-"
              - - !Ref AWS::StackName
                - "WindowsASG"
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation
      - PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation

Outputs:
  LinuxAutoScalingGroup:
    Description: ARN of the Linux Auto Scaling Group
    Value: !Ref LinuxAutoScalingGroup
  WindowsAutoScalingGroup:
    Description: ARN of the Windows Auto Scaling Group
    Value: !Ref WindowsAutoScalingGroup
  LinuxLaunchTemplateId:
    Description: ID of the Linux Launch Template
    Value: !Ref LinuxLaunchTemplate
  WindowsLaunchTemplateId:
    Description: ID of the Windows Launch Template
    Value: !Ref WindowsLaunchTemplate
  InstanceSecurityGroupId:
    Description: ID of the Instance Security Group
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
  SSMRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the SSM IAM Role
    Value: !GetAtt SSMRole.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure Static Website on S3 with CloudFront CDN using service principal bucket policy, custom cache policy, HTTPS enforcement, optimized caching, and Lambda-based bucket initialization/cleanup.

Resources:
  StaticSiteKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for StaticSiteBucket SSE-KMS encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.${AWS::Partition}.amazonaws.com'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudfront.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 'cloudfront.${AWS::Region}.${AWS::Partition}.amazonaws.com'
              StringLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:cloudfront::${AWS::AccountId}:distribution/*'

  StaticSiteBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-static-site-${AWS::StackName}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref StaticSiteKMSKey
        BucketKeyEnabled: true
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3AccessForBucketInitializer
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:ListBucketVersions
                Resource: !GetAtt StaticSiteBucket.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                  - s3:DeleteObjectVersion
                Resource: !Sub '${StaticSiteBucket.Arn}/*'
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600

  BucketInitializerLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import urllib.request

          s3 = boto3.client('s3')

          def send(event, context, success=True, data=None, physical_resource_id=None):
              response_url = event['ResponseURL']
              response_body = {
                  'Status': 'SUCCESS' if success else 'FAILED',
                  'Reason': 'See the details in CloudWatch Log Stream.',
                  'PhysicalResourceId': physical_resource_id or event['PhysicalResourceId'],
                  'StackId': event['StackId'],
                  'RequestId': event['RequestId'],
                  'LogicalResourceId': event['LogicalResourceId'],
                  'Data': data or {}
              }
              json_response_body = json.dumps(response_body)
              headers = {
                  'content-type': '',
                  'content-length': str(len(json_response_body))
              }
              req = urllib.request.Request(response_url, data=json_response_body.encode('utf-8'), method='PUT', headers=headers)
              with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as response:
                  print(response.read())
              return

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              props = event['ResourceProperties']
              bucket = props['BucketName']
              physical_resource_id = bucket
              try:
                  if event['RequestType'] in ['Create', 'Update']:
                      html = b'<html><body>Welcome to Secure Static Site</body></html>'
                      s3.put_object(Bucket=bucket, Key='index.html', Body=html, ContentType='text/html')
                  elif event['RequestType'] == 'Delete':
                      paginator = s3.get_paginator('list_object_versions')
                      for page in paginator.paginate(Bucket=bucket):
                          for version in page.get('Versions', []):
                              s3.delete_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=version['Key'], VersionId=version['VersionId'])
                          for marker in page.get('DeleteMarkers', []):
                              s3.delete_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=marker['Key'], VersionId=marker['VersionId'])
                  send(event, context, True, {'bucket': bucket}, physical_resource_id)
              except Exception as e:
                  print('ERROR: %s' % str(e))
                  send(event,

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Jenkins server deployment across multiple Availability Zones using AWS Auto Scaling Group on EC2 instances in public subnets with SSM integration.'

Parameters: {}

Resources:
  JenkinsVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  JenkinsIGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  JenkinsVPCGWAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref JenkinsIGW

  JenkinsPublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetA'

  JenkinsPublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetB'

  JenkinsPublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  JenkinsPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref JenkinsPublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref JenkinsIGW
    DependsOn: JenkinsVPCGWAttachment

  JenkinsPublicSubnetARTAssocA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref JenkinsPublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref JenkinsPublicRouteTable

  JenkinsPublicSubnetARTAssocB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref JenkinsPublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref JenkinsPublicRouteTable

  JenkinsNACL:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NACL'

  JenkinsNACLAssocA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref JenkinsPublicSubnetA
      NetworkAclId: !Ref JenkinsNACL

  JenkinsNACLAssocB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref JenkinsPublicSubnetB
      NetworkAclId: !Ref JenkinsNACL

  JenkinsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Jenkins EC2 instances
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsSecurityGroup'

  JenkinsEC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: JenkinsEC2SGModify
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:AuthorizeSecurityGroupIngress
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                  - ec2:DescribeSecurityGroups
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsEC2Role'

  JenkinsInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref JenkinsEC2Role

  JenkinsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1}}'
        InstanceType: t3.medium
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt JenkinsInstanceProfile.Arn
        KeyName: !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            Groups:
              - !Ref JenkinsSecurityGroup
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsInstance'
        UserData: !Base64 |
          #!/bin/bash -ex
          yum update -y
          yum install -y java-11-amazon-corretto awscli wget
          yum clean all
          # Install SSM Agent
          cd /tmp
          wget https://s3.amazonaws.com/ec2-downloads-windows/SSMAgent/latest/linux_amd64/amazon-ssm-agent.rpm
          yum install -y amazon-ssm-agent.rpm
          rm -f amazon-ssm-agent.rpm
          systemctl daemon-reload
          systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent
          # Jenkins setup
          useradd --system --home-dir /var/lib/jenkins --shell /bin/false jenkins
          mkdir -p /var/lib/jenkins /var/log/jenkins
          chown -R jenkins:jenkins /var/lib/jenkins /var/log/jenkins
          cd /var/lib/jenkins
          if [[ ! -f jenkins.war ]]; then
            wget https://get.jenkins.io/war-stable/latest/jenkins.war
            chown jenkins:jenkins jenkins.war
          fi
          # Systemd service
          cat > /etc/systemd/system/jenkins.service << 'SERVICE_EOF'
          [Unit]
          Description=Jenkins
          Wants=network-online.target
          After=network-online.target
          [Service]
          Type=notify
          User=jenkins
          Group=jenkins
          ExecStart=/usr/bin/java -Djava.awt.headless=true -jar /var/lib/jenkins/jenkins.war --httpPort=8080 --httpListenAddress=0.0.0.0
          Restart=on-failure
          TimeoutStartSec=0
          [Install]
          WantedBy=multi-user.target
          SERVICE_EOF
          systemctl daemon-reload
          systemctl enable jenkins
          systemctl start jenkins
          # Wait for Jenkins to start
          for i in $(seq 1 30); do
            if curl -f http://localhost:8080/login?from=/ 2>/dev/null; then
              break
            fi
            sleep 10
          done
          # Extract initial password
          PASSWORD=$(cat /var/lib/jenkins/secrets/initialAdminPassword 2>/dev/null || echo "Check logs")
          echo "Jenkins initial admin password: $PASSWORD" >> /var/log/cloud-init-output.log
          echo "$PASSWORD" > /home/ec2-user/jenkins-admin-password.txt
          chmod 400 /home/ec2-user/jenkins-admin-password.txt
          chown ec2-user:ec2-user /home/ec2-user/jenkins-admin-password.txt
          # Dynamically authorize port 8080 (idempotent)
          INSTANCE_ID=$(curl -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/instance-id)
          REGION=$(curl -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/placement/region)
          SG_ID=$(aws ec2 describe-instances --instance-ids $INSTANCE_ID --region $REGION --query 'Reservations[0].Instances[0].SecurityGroups[0].GroupId' --output text 2>/dev/null || true)
          if [[ -n "$SG_ID" ]]; then
            aws ec2 authorize-security-group-ingress --group-id $SG_ID --protocol tcp --port 8080 --cidr 0.0.0.0/0 --region $REGION || true
          fi

  JenkinsASG:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref JenkinsPublicSubnetA
        - !Ref JenkinsPublicSubnetB
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref JenkinsLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt JenkinsLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '2'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsASG'
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

Outputs:
  JenkinsASG:
    Description: Name of the Jenkins Auto Scaling Group
    Value: !Ref JenkinsASG

  JenkinsAccess:
    Description: >-
      Jenkins URL: http://<PUBLIC_IP>:8080 (retrieve PUBLIC_IP and INSTANCE_ID using:
      aws autoscaling describe-auto-scaling-groups --auto-scaling-group-names !Ref JenkinsASG
      then aws ec2 describe-instances --instance-ids <INSTANCE_ID> --query 'Reservations[0].Instances[0].PublicIpAddress').
      Initial admin password via SSM Session Manager:
      aws ssm start-session --target <INSTANCE_ID>
      then cat /home/ec2-user/jenkins-admin-password.txt
    Value: 'See description for access instructions'

  JenkinsInstanceProfile:
    Description: IAM Instance Profile for Jenkins instances
    Value: !Ref JenkinsInstanceProfile
