final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys an AWS Bedrock Agent integrated with a Lambda function for automated stock price lookup using Claude 3 Sonnet foundation model.'

Parameters:
  ModelId:
    Type: String
    Default: anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0
    Description: Bedrock foundation model ID (e.g., anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0)
  AgentName:
    Type: String
    Default: StockPriceAgent
    Description: Name of the Bedrock Agent
  AgentDescription:
    Type: String
    Default: Bedrock Agent for stock price lookup using Lambda action group
    Description: Description of the Bedrock Agent
  ActionGroupName:
    Type: String
    Default: getStockPrice
    Description: Name of the Agent Action Group

Resources:
  StockPriceLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-StockPriceLambdaRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-StockPriceLambdaRole"
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: StockLookupInfrastructure

  StockPriceLookupFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-StockPriceLookupFunction"
      Role: !GetAtt StockPriceLambdaRole.Arn
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event, context) => {
            console.log('Received event:', JSON.stringify(event, null, 2));
            try {
              if (!event.requestBody || !event.requestBody.value || !event.requestBody.value.body) {
                throw new Error('Missing request body');
              }
              const requestBody = JSON.parse(event.requestBody.value.body);
              const symbol = requestBody.stockSymbol || 'DEFAULT';
              const responseBody = {
                price: 100,
                symbol: symbol
              };
              return {
                statusCode: 200,
                headers: {
                  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
                },
                body: JSON.stringify(responseBody)
              };
            } catch (error) {
              console.error('Error:', error);
              return {
                statusCode: 400,
                headers: {
                  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid input or processing error' })
              };
            }
          };
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-StockPriceLookupFunction"
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: StockLookupInfrastructure

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref StockPriceLookupFunction
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: bedrock.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:agent/${StockLookupAgent}'

  BedrockAgentRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BedrockAgentRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: bedrock.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:agent/*'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BedrockInvokeModelPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: bedrock:InvokeModel
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}::foundation-models/${ModelId}'
        - PolicyName: LambdaInvokePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt StockPriceLookupFunction.Arn
        - PolicyName: CloudWatchLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/bedrock/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BedrockAgentRole"
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: StockLookupInfrastructure

  StockLookupAgent:
    Type: AWS::Bedrock::Agent
    Properties:
      AgentName: !Ref AgentName
      Description: !Ref AgentDescription
      FoundationModel: !Sub 'arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}::foundation-models/${ModelId}'
      Instruction: >-
        You are a helpful assistant that uses the getStockPrice action to fetch current stock prices when users ask about stock symbols.
        Always invoke the action for price queries and summarize the response.
      AgentResourceRoleArn: !GetAtt BedrockAgentRole.Arn
      IdleSessionTTLInSeconds: 60
      ActionGroups:
        - ActionGroupName: !Ref ActionGroupName
          ActionGroupExecutor:
            Lambda: !GetAtt StockPriceLookupFunction.Arn
          ApiSchema:
            Payload: |
              openapi: 3.0.0
              info:
                title: Stock Price Lookup API
                version: 1.0.0
              paths:
                /getStockPrice:
                  post:
                    requestBody:
                      required: true
                      content:
                        application/json:
                          schema:
                            type: object
                            required:
                              - stockSymbol
                            properties:
                              stockSymbol:
                                type: string
                                description: The stock symbol (e.g., AAPL) to retrieve the price for
                    responses:
                      '200':
                        description: Successful stock price retrieval
                        content:
                          application/json:
                            schema:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                symbol:
                                  type: string
                                  description: The stock symbol
                                price:
                                  type: number
                                  description: The current stock price
              components:
                securitySchemes: {}
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-StockLookupAgent"
        Purpose: StockLookupInfrastructure

  StockLookupAgentAlias:
    Type: AWS::Bedrock::AgentAlias
    Properties:
      AgentId: !Ref StockLookupAgent
      AgentAliasName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-StockPriceAlias"
      Description: Default alias for the Stock Price Lookup Agent
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-StockLookupAgentAlias"
        Purpose: StockLookupInfrastructure

Outputs:
  AgentId:
    Description: ID of the Bedrock Agent
    Value: !Ref StockLookupAgent
  AgentAliasId:
    Description: ID of the Bedrock Agent Alias
    Value: !Ref StockLookupAgentAlias
  AgentAliasArn:
    Description: ARN of the Bedrock Agent Alias
    Value: !GetAtt StockLookupAgentAlias.AgentAliasArn
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt StockPriceLookupFunction.Arn
  ActionGroupName:
    Description: Name of the Agent Action Group
    Value: !Ref ActionGroupName
  BedrockAgentRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Bedrock Agent IAM Role
    Value: !GetAtt BedrockAgentRole.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure, scalable Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster with RDS Proxy integration, VPC, private subnets, Secrets Manager, IAM auth, enhanced monitoring, and Performance Insights.'

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  PrivateSubnetCidrBlocks:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24,10.0.2.0/24,10.0.3.0/24
  DBClusterIdentifier:
    Type: String
    Default: 'aurora-cluster'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z]([a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9])?$'
    MaxLength: 63
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must match RDS DB identifier format (1-63 chars, alphanumeric + hyphen, start/end letter)'
  DBInstanceClass:
    Type: String
    Default: db.t3.medium
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: 'admin'
  MasterUserPassword:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Default: 'Ch4ng3M3!Str0ngP@ssw0rd123'
  AuroraEngineVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: 8.0.mysql_aurora.3.02.0

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs [!Ref 'AWS::Region']]
      CidrBlock: !Select [0, !Ref PrivateSubnetCidrBlocks]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs [!Ref 'AWS::Region']]
      CidrBlock: !Select [1, !Ref PrivateSubnetCidrBlocks]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false

  PrivateSubnet3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [2, !GetAZs [!Ref 'AWS::Region']]
      CidrBlock: !Select [2, !Ref PrivateSubnetCidrBlocks]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet3RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet3
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  EndpointSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for VPC endpoints
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidr

  SecretsManagerEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.secretsmanager'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet3
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EndpointSecurityGroup

  RdsEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.rds'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet3
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EndpointSecurityGroup

  LogsEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.logs'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet3
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EndpointSecurityGroup

  MonitoringEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.monitoring'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet3
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EndpointSecurityGroup

  DbClusterMasterSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-aurora-secret'
      SecretString: !Sub '{"username":"${MasterUsername}","password":"${MasterUserPassword}"}'

  RdsProxyRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: rds.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-proxy-policy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
                  - secretsmanager:GetRandomPassword
                Resource: !Ref DbClusterMasterSecret

  EnhancedMonitoringRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: monitoring.rds.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonRDSEnhancedMonitoringRole

  AuroraKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for ${AWS::StackName} Aurora encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow use of the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: rds.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'

  LambdaSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Lambda functions
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  RdsProxySecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for RDS Proxy
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref LambdaSecurityGroup

  DbClusterSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Aurora DB cluster
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref RdsProxySecurityGroup

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for Aurora cluster
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet3

  AuroraCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    Properties:
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      EngineVersion: !Ref AuroraEngineVersion
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref DBClusterIdentifier
      MasterUserSecret:
        SecretArn: !Ref DbClusterMasterSecret
      KmsKeyId: !Ref AuroraKmsKey
      StorageEncrypted: true
      EnableIAMDatabaseAuthentication: true
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref DbClusterSecurityGroup
      EnableCloudwatchLogsExports:
        - error
        - general
        - slowquery
      PerformanceInsightsEnabled: true

  AuroraPrimaryInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraCluster
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${DBClusterIdentifier}-inst1'
      DBInstanceClass: !Ref DBInstanceClass
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      MonitoringRoleArn: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${EnhancedMonitoringRole}'
      MonitoringInterval: 60
      EnablePerformanceInsights: true
      PubliclyAccessible: false

  AuroraReaderInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraCluster
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${DBClusterIdentifier}-inst2'
      DBInstanceClass: !Ref DBInstanceClass
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      MonitoringRoleArn: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${EnhancedMonitoringRole}'
      MonitoringInterval: 60
      EnablePerformanceInsights: true
      PubliclyAccessible: false

  RdsProxy:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBProxy
    Properties:
      DBProxyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-proxy'
      EngineFamily: MYSQL
      RoleArn: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${RdsProxyRole}'
      IdleClientTimeout: 1800
      RequireTLS: true
      VpcSubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet3
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref RdsProxySecurityGroup
      Auth:
        - AuthScheme: 'SECRETS'
          SecretArn: !Ref DbClusterMasterSecret

  RdsProxyTargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBProxyTargetGroup
    Properties:
      DBProxyName: !Ref RdsProxy
      TargetGroupName: 'default'
      ConnectionPoolConfigurationInfo:
        MaxConnectionsPercent: 80
        MaxIdleConnectionsPercent: 50
      DBClusterIdentifiers:
        - !Ref AuroraCluster

Outputs:
  AuroraClusterEndpoint:
    Description: Aurora cluster endpoint address
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraCluster.Endpoint.Address
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-aurora-endpoint'

  RdsProxyEndpoint:
    Description: RDS Proxy endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt RdsProxy.Endpoint
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-proxy-endpoint'

  DbClusterMasterSecretArn:
    Description: Secrets Manager secret ARN
    Value: !Ref DbClusterMasterSecret
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-secret-arn'

  DbClusterSecurityGroupId:
    Description: DB Cluster Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref DbClusterSecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dbcluster-sg-id'

  RdsProxySecurityGroupId:
    Description: RDS Proxy Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref RdsProxySecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-proxy-sg-id'

  LambdaSecurityGroupId:
    Description: Lambda Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref LambdaSecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-lambda-sg-id'

  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc-id'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Multi-AZ VPC with two public subnets and one private subnet using static AZ mapping for persistence.'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AZ1: us-east-1a
      AZ2: us-east-1b
    us-east-2:
      AZ1: us-east-2a
      AZ2: us-east-2b
    us-west-2:
      AZ1: us-west-2a
      AZ2: us-west-2b
    eu-west-1:
      AZ1: eu-west-1a
      AZ2: eu-west-1b

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ1]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Public-A'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Public

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ2]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Public-B'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Public

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ1]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Private-A'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Private

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRT'

  PrivateSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

  PublicSubnetAId:
    Description: Public Subnet A ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnetA
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetAId'

  PublicSubnetBId:
    Description: Public Subnet B ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnetB
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetBId'

  PrivateSubnetAId:
    Description: Private Subnet A ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetAId'

  AZ1:
    Description: Availability Zone 1
    Value: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ1]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AZ1'

  AZ2:
    Description: Availability Zone 2
    Value: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ2]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AZ2'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that provisions AWS Glue ETL infrastructure including secure S3 storage for scripts and logs, IAM role with necessary permissions, and a Glue ETL job using runtime version 4.0.'

Parameters:
  StackName:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Unique name for the stack to use in resource naming.'
    Default: 'glue-etl-stack'
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Prefix for the S3 bucket name to ensure global uniqueness.'
    Default: 'glue-etl-bucket'

Resources:
  S3EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${StackName} S3 bucket encryption key'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow Glue service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'glue.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3EncryptionKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket}/gue_scripts/*'
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket}/logs/*'

  GlueRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${StackName}-GlueRole'
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${StackName}-S3AndLogsPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/gue_scripts/*'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/logs/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey
                  - kms:Decrypt
                Resource: !GetAtt S3EncryptionKey.Arn

  ETLJob:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Job
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${StackName}-ETLJob'
      Role: !GetAtt GlueRole.Arn
      GlueVersion: '4.0'
      Command:
        Name: glueetl
        ScriptLocation: !Sub 's3://${S3Bucket}/gue_scripts/sample_convert.py'
        PythonVersion: '3'
      WorkerType: G.1X
      NumberOfWorkers: 2
      Timeout: 60
      MaxRetries: 0

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket for Glue scripts and logs.'
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  GlueRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the IAM role for the Glue job.'
    Value: !GetAtt GlueRole.Arn
  ETLJobName:
    Description: 'Name of the Glue ETL job.'
